text_0011.EN: This outpost was built decades ago to seal the cursed cave. Rusty weapons and scattered military journals lie everywhere.
text_0011.CN: 这个前哨站是几十年前建造的，用来封闭被诅咒的洞穴。生锈的武器和散落的军事期刊随处可见。

text_0012.EN: Available locations: east_sentry | swamp_command | top_headquarters | back
text_0012.CN: 可用地点： east_sentry |沼泽命令 |顶部总部 |后退

text_0014.EN: You leave the military fort and return to the northern road area.
text_0014.CN: 你离开军事要塞并返回北路区域。

text_0016.EN: I lost my military ration pack in the eastern woods. I cannot hold this sentry post without supplies.
text_0016.CN: 我在东部树林里丢了军用口粮包。没有补给我就无法坚守这个哨所。

text_0018.EN: You hand over your food. The soldier gives you a military bronze key for the armory.
text_0018.CN: 你交出你的食物。士兵给你一把军械库的军用青铜钥匙。

text_0019.EN: Head to the swamp command post and ask the lieutenant for the march password.
text_0019.CN: 前往沼泽指挥所并向中尉询问行军密码。

text_0020.EN: You carry no food to offer.

text_0021.EN: You steal military supplies and trigger an old trap. The soldier becomes hostile toward you.
text_0021.CN: 你偷走了军事物资并触发了一个旧陷阱。士兵对你产生敌意。

text_0022.EN: The soldier stands guard quietly, his request has been fulfilled.
text_0022.CN: 士兵静静地站岗，他的要求已经满足了。

text_0024.EN: The march password is split into three fragments recorded in garrison journals.
text_0024.CN: 行军密码被分成三个片段，记录在驻军日志中。

text_0025.EN: Puzzle: The three seal locations are forest graveyard altar. Enter the first letter of each rune in uppercase order.
text_0025.CN: 谜题：三个封印地点是森林墓地祭坛。按大写顺序输入每个符文的第一个字母。

text_0027.EN: Password verified. You gain full trap immunity within the misty swamp.
text_0027.CN: 密码已验证。你在迷雾沼泽中获得完全的陷阱免疫。

text_0028.EN: Wrong code. Poison gas leaks and injures you.
text_0028.CN: 代码错误。毒气泄漏并伤害您。

text_0029.EN: Deliver all three garrison journals to the colonel at the top headquarters to uncover hidden historical truth.
text_0029.CN: 将所有三份驻军日志交给最高指挥部的上校，以揭开隐藏的历史真相。

text_0031.EN: Return to me once you have collected all three military garrison journals. I will reveal the official record of the cave seal.
text_0031.CN: 收集完所有三本军事驻军日志后就回到我这里。我将透露有关洞封的官方记录。

text_0032.EN: You submit all journals. The colonel narrates the sealed history of your family's eternal guardianship.
text_0032.CN: 您提交所有期刊。上校讲述了你们家族永恒守护的封印历史。

text_0033.EN: You obtain classified archive files which unlock a hidden military ending route.
text_0033.CN: 你获得机密档案文件，解锁隐藏的军事结局路线。

text_0036.EN: A primitive orc settlement trapped inside the infinite cave cycle. You can choose to negotiate or raid this tribe.
text_0036.CN: 一个原始的兽人定居点被困在无限的洞穴循环中。你可以选择谈判或袭击这个部落。

input_0037.CN: 兽人> 谈判 |突袭|搜索图腾 |后退：

text_0038.EN: You leave the orc dungeon area.

text_0039.EN: You discover the stolen tribal totem hidden behind loose stone blocks.
text_0039.CN: 你发现被盗的部落图腾隐藏在松散的石块后面。

text_0040.EN: The tribal totem has already been retrieved.

text_0041.EN: You return the sacred totem. The chieftain gifts you a durable pickaxe and marks all cave traps on your map.
text_0041.CN: 你归还神圣图腾。酋长赠送给你一把耐用的镐，并在你的地图上标记所有洞穴陷阱。

text_0042.EN: The tribe refuses to communicate until their stolen totem is returned.
text_0042.CN: 在归还被盗图腾之前，部落拒绝交流。

text_0043.EN: You attack the tribe and seize gold treasures, but gain heavy evil karma. All orcs will stay hostile in subsequent playthroughs.
text_0043.CN: 你攻击部落并夺取金银财宝，但却获得了沉重的恶业。所有兽人在随后的游戏中都将保持敌对状态。

text_0046.EN: A primordial titan sleeps deep inside the illusion tunnel, witnessing the birth of the ancient sealing curse.
text_0046.CN: 一位太古泰坦沉睡在幻象隧道的深处，见证了远古封印诅咒的诞生。

input_0047.CN: 提供祈祷|承认罪孽 |出发：

text_0048.EN: The titan grants you full vitality and pure spiritual alignment.
text_0048.CN: 泰坦赋予你充分的活力和纯粹的精神一致性。

text_0049.EN: All your accumulated evil karma is completely cleansed by ancient holy light.
text_0049.CN: 你所有累积的恶业都被远古圣光彻底净化。

text_0050.EN: You leave the titan's resting place without receiving any blessing.
text_0050.CN: 你离开了泰坦的安息之地，没有得到任何祝福。

text_0051.EN: The titan remains in eternal slumber and refuses to interact again.
text_0051.CN: 泰坦保持着永恒的沉睡，拒绝再次互动。

text_0053.EN: Dust dances in faint light. Rows of stone shelves hold ancient scrolls.
text_0053.CN: 尘埃在微弱的灯光下舞动。一排排石架上放着古老的卷轴。

text_0054.EN: The wizard built this place to seal his most dangerous experiments.
text_0054.CN: 巫师建造这个地方是为了封印他最危险的实验。

text_0055.EN: Four chambers lie ahead. Only the wise may reach the core.
text_0055.CN: 前面有四个房间。只有智者才能到达核心。

text_0056.EN: Try to type look in every hall.
text_0056.CN: 试着在每个大厅里打字看看。

text_0057.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0057.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0058.EN: You climb out of the archive to the road.\n
text_0058.CN: 你爬出档案馆，来到路上。\n

text_0059.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_0059.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_0060.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_0060.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_0062.EN: Four rune pedestals stand before a stone door: moon, sun, void, star.
text_0062.CN: 石门前立着四个符文基座：月亮、太阳、虚空、星星。

text_0063.EN: Faded verse on the wall reads:

text_0064.EN: 'First the one that wakes the field,

text_0065.EN: Then the one that guards the shield,

text_0066.EN: Third the one that leads the lost,
text_0066.CN: 第三，带领失丧者的那一位，

text_0067.EN: Last the one that bears the cost.'
text_0067.CN: 最后一个承担费用的人。

text_0068.EN: Type 'press [rune]' to activate a pedestal. Wrong order resets progress.
text_0068.CN: 输入“按[符文]”来激活基座。错误的顺序会重置进度。

text_0070.EN: The stone door rumbles open. You enter the mirror corridor.
text_0070.CN: 石门轰然打开。你进入镜子走廊。

text_0071.EN: You collapse under the magic surge.
text_0071.CN: 你在魔法浪潮下崩溃了。

text_0072.EN: Unknown command. Try 'look' to examine the room.
text_0072.CN: 未知命令。尝试“看”来检查房间。

text_0073.EN: You squeeze through the narrow side door into a tiny workshop.
text_0073.CN: 你挤过狭窄的侧门进入一个小车间。

text_0074.CN: 未知命令。尝试“转发”或“研讨会”。

text_0075.EN: A tiny workshop hidden behind the bookshelf. Gears and runestones scatter everywhere.
text_0075.CN: 书架后面隐藏着一个小作坊。齿轮和符石散落各处。

text_0076.EN: A gnarled rock gnome hunches over the workbench, his beard braided with copper wire.
text_0076.CN: 一个粗糙的岩石侏儒弯腰驼背在工作台上，他的胡须用铜线编成辫子。

text_0077.EN: He freezes when he hears you, then slowly turns around.
text_0077.CN: 当他听到你说话时，他愣住了，然后慢慢转过身来。

text_0078.EN: Type talk to talk, you should talk for more times.
text_0078.CN: 打字说话说话，你应该多说话。

text_0079.EN: Bryn: Back off! This place belongs to the wizard. No trespassers allowed.
text_0079.CN: 布林：退后！这个地方属于巫师。不允许擅自闯入。

text_0080.EN: He picks up a small wrench, looking both nervous and fierce.
text_0080.CN: 他拿起一把小扳手，看上去既紧张又凶狠。

text_0082.EN: What a joke! Kill by a tiny stone!
text_0082.CN: 开什么玩笑啊！被小石头砸死！

text_0083.EN: You tell him you are the wizard's descendant, here to end the curse.
text_0083.CN: 你告诉他你是巫师的后裔，来这里是为了结束诅咒。

text_0084.EN: Bryn stares at you for a long time. His hands start to shake.
text_0084.CN: 布林盯着你看了很长时间。他的手开始颤抖。

text_0085.EN: Bryn: ...You have his eyes. Really his blood.
text_0085.CN: 布林：……你有他的眼睛。确实是他的血。

text_0086.EN: Bryn: Two hundred years. I waited two hundred years for someone to come.
text_0086.CN: 布林：两百年了。我等了两百年才有人来。

text_0087.EN: Bryn: Sit. I'll tell you everything he never wrote in the diaries.
text_0087.CN: 布林：坐下。我会告诉你他日记中没有写过的一切。

text_0088.EN: Bryn looks up from his work. What do you want to know?
text_0088.CN: 布林从工作中抬起头来。你想知道什么？

text_0089.EN: You can ask: wizard / curse / himself / outside / dwarf / hints / upgrade / help him leave / steal from him
text_0089.CN: 你可以问：巫师/诅咒/他自己/外面/矮人/提示/升级/帮助他离开/从他那里偷东西

text_0090.EN: Bryn: He was never a hero. He was just a man scared of losing his wife.
text_0090.CN: 布林：他从来都不是英雄。他只是一个害怕失去妻子的男人。

text_0091.EN: Bryn: Everyone said he sealed her to save the world. Lies.
text_0091.CN: 布林：每个人都说他封印了她来拯救世界。谎言。

text_0092.EN: Bryn: He sealed her because he couldn't bear to let her die, even as a monster.
text_0092.CN: 布林：他封印了她，因为他不忍心让她死去，即使她是一个怪物。

text_0093.EN: Bryn: Foolish man. Spent his whole life building a cage for the person he loved.
text_0093.CN: 布林：愚蠢的人。他用一生的时间为自己所爱的人建造了一个牢笼。

text_0094.EN: Bryn: The curse didn't start with her. It started with the dwarven relic he stole.
text_0094.CN: 布林：诅咒并不是从她开始的。事情要从他偷走的矮人遗物说起。

text_0095.EN: Bryn: Gimble thought he could use it to cure her. It only made things worse.
text_0095.CN: 布林：金布尔认为他可以用它来治愈她。这只会让事情变得更糟。

text_0096.EN: Bryn: That's why the dwarf is down there, guarding the tomb. He blames us all.
text_0096.CN: 布林：这就是矮人在下面看守坟墓的原因。他责怪我们所有人。

text_0097.EN: Bryn: ...To be honest, he's not entirely wrong.
text_0097.CN: 布林：……说实话，他并不完全错。

text_0098.EN: Bryn: I? I was his chief machinist. Built all the traps, all the seals, all the puzzles.
text_0098.CN: 布林：我？我是他的首席机械师。建造了所有的陷阱、所有的封印、所有的谜题。

text_0099.EN: Bryn: He told me to guard the archive until the heir arrived. So I stayed.
text_0099.CN: 布林：他告诉我要保管好档案，直到继承人到来。所以我留下来了。

text_0100.EN: Bryn: Didn't even need magic. Gnome lives are long enough to wait out a human curse.
text_0100.CN: 布林：甚至不需要魔法。侏儒的寿命足够长，可以等待人类的诅咒结束。

text_0101.EN: He laughs bitterly, tapping his cane on the stone floor.
text_0101.CN: 他苦笑着，用手杖敲打着石头地板。

text_0102.EN: Bryn: Gimble. Used to be my best friend. Best blacksmith under the mountain.
text_0102.CN: 布林：金布尔。曾经是我最好的朋友。山下最好的铁匠。

text_0103.EN: Bryn: He came here to help us. Then the relic corrupted him.
text_0103.CN: 布林：他来这里是为了帮助我们。然后这件遗物腐蚀了他。

text_0104.EN: Bryn: Now he's just an angry thing guarding the tomb. Doesn't remember anyone.
text_0104.CN: 布林：现在他只是一个守卫坟墓的愤怒之物。不记得任何人。

text_0105.EN: Bryn: If you can ... don't kill him. He's suffered enough.
text_0105.CN: 布林：如果可以的话……不要杀他。他已经受够苦了。

text_0107.EN: The gnome seems to be quiet, do not answer you, just looking at you.
text_0107.CN: 侏儒似乎很安静，没有回答你，只是看着你。

text_0108.EN: Bryn: Hints cost faith energy. Which puzzle are you stuck on?
text_0108.CN: 布林：提示需要消耗信仰能量。你被哪个谜题困住了？

text_0109.CN: 符文/镜子/鳞片/最终锁定

text_0110.EN: Bryn: Think about the sky. What comes first, what comes after?
text_0110.CN: 布林：想想天空。什么在先，什么在后？

text_0111.EN: Bryn: Sun wakes the world, moon guards the night, star leads the lost, void ends all.
text_0111.CN: 布林：太阳唤醒世界，月亮守护黑夜，星星引领迷失，虚空终结一切。

text_0112.EN: Bryn: Not enough faith. Go pray at the altar first.
text_0112.CN: 布林：信心不够。先去祭坛祈祷吧。

text_0113.EN: Bryn takes your lamp, scribes tiny runes on the glass.
text_0113.CN: 布林拿起你的灯，在玻璃上写下了微小的符文。

text_0114.EN: Bryn: There. Won't run out of oil anymore. Don't break it.
text_0114.CN: 布林：在那里。不会再没油了别弄坏它。

text_0115.EN: Bryn: And ... be careful down there. Darkness eats people like you.
text_0115.CN: 布林：还有……下面要小心。黑暗会吞噬像你这样的人。

text_0116.EN: Bryn: You need a lamp and a steady heart. You're not ready yet.
text_0116.CN: 布林：你需要一盏灯和一颗稳定的心。你还没准备好。

text_0117.EN: You break the sealing rune on the workshop door.
text_0117.CN: 你打破了车间门上的密封符文。

text_0118.EN: Bryn stares at the open passage for a long time. He doesn't move at first.
text_0118.CN: 布林盯着空旷的通道良久。一开始他没有动。

text_0119.EN: Bryn: I ... I thought I'd die down here.
text_0119.CN: 布林：我……我以为我会死在这里。

text_0120.EN: He takes a small toolkit from his belt and hands it to you.
text_0120.CN: 他从腰带上拿出一个小工具箱，递给你。

text_0121.EN: Bryn: Take this. All my best work. It'll protect you from traps.
text_0121.CN: 布林：拿着这个。都是我最好的作品。它会保护你免受陷阱的侵害。

text_0122.EN: Bryn: I'm going up. To see the sun again.
text_0122.CN: 布林：我要上去。才能再次见到太阳。

text_0123.EN: He then go into a small tunnal.
text_0123.CN: 然后他进入了一个小隧道。

text_0124.EN: Bryn: The seal only responds to a pure heart. You still carry too much darkness.
text_0124.CN: 布林：海豹只回应一颗纯洁的心。你身上还带着太多的黑暗。

text_0125.EN: You sneak toward his toolbox while he's not looking.
text_0125.CN: 你趁他不注意的时候偷偷溜向他的工具箱。

text_0126.EN: He slams his hammer down right beside your hand.
text_0126.CN: 他将锤子重重地砸在你的手边。

text_0127.EN: Bryn: I knew it. Just like him. Greedy. Always greedy.
text_0127.CN: 布林：我就知道。就像他一样。贪婪的。总是贪婪的。

text_0128.EN: The wall behind you slides shut. He vanishes into a side tunnel.
text_0128.CN: 你身后的墙滑关了。他消失在一条侧隧道中。

text_0129.EN: You hear his voice from the dark: 'Find your own way out.'
text_0129.CN: 你从黑暗中听到他的声音：“自己寻找出路。”

text_0130.EN: You don't see any tools to steal yet.
text_0130.CN: 您还没有看到任何可以窃取的工具。

text_0131.EN: Bryn: Really? Attack a poor old gnome? You are so evil!
text_0131.CN: 布林：真的吗？攻击一个可怜的老侏儒？你太邪恶了！

text_0132.EN: You tell him a silly joke about ghosts.
text_0132.CN: 你给他讲了一个关于鬼魂的愚蠢笑话。

text_0133.EN: He snorts, then chuckles, then laughs out loud — a rough, rusty sound.
text_0133.CN: 他哼了一声，然后轻笑，然后放声大笑——一种粗糙、生锈的声音。

text_0134.EN: Bryn: Hundreds of years. First joke I've heard.
text_0134.CN: 布林：几百年了。我听到的第一个笑话。

text_0135.EN: He tosses you a small healing crystal.
text_0135.CN: 他扔给你一个小的治疗水晶。

text_0136.EN: You hand him your food. He stares at it like it's a treasure.
text_0136.CN: 你把食物递给他。他盯着它，就像它是一个宝藏一样。

text_0137.EN: Bryn: Fresh bread. I almost forgot what it tastes like.
text_0137.CN: 布林：新鲜面包。我差点忘了是什么味道了。

text_0138.EN: He eats slowly, very slowly. His eyes soften.
text_0138.CN: 他吃得很慢，非常慢。他的眼神变得柔和。

text_0139.EN: Bryn: Alright. Ask me anything. I'll give you one free hint.
text_0139.CN: 布林：好的。有什么事就问我吧。我会给你一个免费的提示。

text_0140.EN: You have no food to give him.

text_0141.EN: You step back into the balance hall.

text_0142.EN: Bryn looks at you expectantly, waiting for you to speak.
text_0142.CN: 布林满怀期待地看着你，等待你说话。

text_0143.EN: Three mirrors stand in a line, each can rotate left or right.
text_0143.CN: 三块镜子排成一排，每块镜子都可以向左或向右旋转。

text_0144.EN: A light beam enters from the left wall. It must reach the right receiver.
text_0144.CN: 一道光束从左侧墙壁射入。它必须到达正确的接收者。

text_0145.EN: Type 'turn mirror1 left', 'turn mirror2 right' etc. to adjust.
text_0145.CN: 输入“左转后视镜1”、“右后视镜2”等进行调整。

text_0146.EN: Type 'beam' to fire the light and test your setup.
text_0146.CN: 输入“beam”来点亮灯光并测试您的设置。

text_0151.EN: Light travels through all mirrors and hits the receiver.
text_0151.CN: 光线穿过所有镜子并到达接收器。

text_0152.EN: A hidden passage opens to the balance chamber.
text_0152.CN: 一条隐藏的通道通向平衡室。

text_0153.EN: You fall to the scorching beam.
text_0153.CN: 你跌倒在灼热的光束上。

text_0154.EN: Unknown command. Try 'look' to examine the room.
text_0154.CN: 未知命令。尝试“看”来检查房间。

text_0155.EN: A stone scale stands in the center. Left plate holds a 7-unit weight.
text_0155.CN: 一块石秤矗立在中央。左板可容纳 7 个单位的重量。

text_0156.EN: You must place items from your bag on the right plate to balance it exactly.
text_0156.CN: 您必须将包中的物品放在正确的盘子上以使其精确平衡。

text_0157.EN: Type 'place [item name]' to put an item on the plate.
text_0157.CN: 输入“place [物品名称]”将物品放在盘子上。

text_0158.EN: Type 'weigh' to check if the scale is balanced.
text_0158.CN: 输入“称重”以检查天平是否平衡。

text_0159.EN: Type 'clear' to take all items back.
text_0159.CN: 输入“清除”以取回所有项目。

text_0160.EN: You take all items back from the plate.
text_0160.CN: 你把盘子里的所有东西都拿回来。

text_0162.EN: That item is already on the plate.

text_0163.EN: The scale balances perfectly. The main door to the core unlocks.
text_0163.CN: 天平完美平衡。通往核心的大门打开。

text_0164.EN: You also notice a small, hidden side door half-buried in dust.
text_0164.CN: 您还注意到一扇隐藏的小侧门半埋在灰尘中。

text_0165.EN: Type 'workshop' to enter the side room, or 'forward' to continue to the core.
text_0165.CN: 输入“workshop”进入侧室，或输入“forward”继续前往核心。

text_0166.EN: The scale tilts sharply and hits you. HP -2
text_0166.CN: 天平急剧倾斜并击中您。生命值-2

text_0167.EN: You are crushed by the falling scale.
text_0167.CN: 你被下降的天平压垮了。

text_0168.EN: Unknown command. Try 'look' to examine the room.
text_0168.CN: 未知命令。尝试“看”来检查房间。

text_0169.EN: You squeeze through the narrow side door into a tiny workshop.
text_0169.CN: 你挤过狭窄的侧门进入一个小车间。

text_0170.EN: The gnome have already gone, just a empty tiny workshop.
text_0170.CN: 侏儒已经走了，只剩下一个空荡荡的小作坊。

text_0171.CN: 未知命令。尝试“转发”或“研讨会”。

text_0172.EN: A heavy iron door blocks the way. It has a 3-digit combination lock.
text_0172.CN: 一扇厚重的铁门挡住了去路。它有一个 3 位密码锁。

text_0174.EN: 'Count of the first runes, turns of the middle path, weight of the last truth.'
text_0174.CN: “计算第一个符文，中间路径的转弯，最后真理的重量。”

text_0175.EN: Type 'enter [3-digit code]' to try the combination.
text_0175.CN: 输入“输入[3位代码]”来尝试该组合。

text_0176.EN: You may also 'pray' at the small altar beside the door for a hint.
text_0176.CN: 您也可以在门边的小祭坛上“祈祷”以获得提示。

text_0177.EN: A soft voice whispers: 'Four runes pressed, three mirrors turned, seven stones weighed.'
text_0177.CN: 一个轻柔的声音低语道：“按下四个符文，转动三面镜子，称重七块石头。”

text_0178.EN: Hint: first digit = number of correct runes.
text_0178.CN: 提示：第一个数字 = 正确符文的数量。

text_0179.EN: You lack enough faith to receive guidance.
text_0179.CN: 你缺乏足够的信心来接受指导。

text_0180.EN: The lock clicks. The core chamber opens before you.
text_0180.CN: 锁发出咔哒声。核心室在你面前打开。

text_0181.EN: Warm light flows out, filling the archive.
text_0181.CN: 温暖的光线流淌出来，充满了档案室。

text_0183.EN: Unknown command. Try 'look' to examine the room.
text_0183.CN: 未知命令。尝试“看”来检查房间。

text_0187.EN: The air is cold and still. You hear faint humming.
text_0187.CN: 空气寒冷而静止。你听到微弱的嗡嗡声。

text_0188.EN: Small toys scatter across the stone floor.
text_0188.CN: 小玩具散落在石头地板上。

text_0189.EN: A tiny coffin sits in the corner, carved with stars.
text_0189.CN: 角落里放着一口小棺材，上面刻着星星。

text_0190.EN: A child's voice whispers: 'Did you come to play?'
text_0190.CN: 一个孩子的声音低声说道：“你是来玩的吗？”

text_0191.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0191.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0192.EN: You step back quietly, closing the small door.
text_0192.CN: 你静静地退后一步，关上小门。

text_0193.EN: Four toys lie on the ground: crayon, horse, doll, coffin(just a toy).
text_0193.CN: 地上有四个玩具：蜡笔、马、洋娃娃、棺材（只是一个玩具）。

text_0194.EN: Wall drawings show a boy drawing, riding, playing, then sleeping.
text_0194.CN: 墙上的画展示了一个男孩画画、骑马、玩耍，然后睡觉。

text_0195.EN: Type 'place [toy]' to put them on the stone altar in order.
text_0195.CN: 输入“放置[玩具]”将它们按顺序放在石坛上。

text_0197.EN: That is not a toy here.

text_0199.EN: \nAll toys glow silver. A small boy appears before you.
text_0199.CN: \n所有玩具都发出银色光芒。一个小男孩出现在你面前。

text_0200.EN: He looks about seven years old, pale and quiet.
text_0200.CN: 他看上去七岁左右，面色苍白，安静。

text_0201.EN: All toys fall off the altar.
text_0201.CN: 所有玩具都从祭坛上掉下来。

text_0202.EN: You collapse. The child whispers: 'Sleep then... stay forever.'
text_0202.CN: 你崩溃了。孩子轻声说道：“那就睡吧……永远留下来。”

text_0203.CN: 你把所有玩具都拿回来。

text_0204.EN: Boy: 'Then answer my questions. If you lie... I will know.'
text_0204.CN: 男孩：“那么回答我的问题吧。”如果你撒谎……我会知道的。

text_0205.EN: Boy: 'Then why are you here? To steal from me too?'
text_0205.CN: 男孩：“那你为什么在这里？也来偷我的东西吗？

text_0206.EN: The room goes dark. Something pushes you hard.
text_0206.CN: 房间变暗了。有些东西在逼迫你。

text_0208.EN: You fall and never wake up.
text_0208.CN: 你跌倒了，就再也不会醒来。

text_0209.EN: Boy: 'Answer me. Are you here to play?'
text_0209.CN: 男孩：‘回答我。你来这里玩吗？

text_0211.EN: The boy smiles brightly. The door closes forever.
text_0211.CN: 男孩笑容灿烂。门永远关闭了。

text_0212.EN: You sit down and play with him. For a day, a year, an eternity.
text_0212.CN: 你坐下来陪他玩。一天，一年，永恒。

text_0214.CN: 男孩：“我就知道。每个人都离开了。

text_0215.EN: He looks down, sad but not angry.
text_0215.CN: 他低下头，悲伤但并不生气。

text_0216.EN: Boy: 'Will you stay with me forever?'
text_0216.CN: 男孩：“你会永远和我在一起吗？”

text_0217.EN: The boy's eyes widen. 'You know him?'
text_0217.CN: 男孩睁大了眼睛。 “你认识他？”

text_0218.EN: 'He put me here. He said he would bring me back.'
text_0218.CN: '他把我放在这里。他说他会带我回来。

text_0221.EN: 'You are honest. Take this. Tell him I am not angry.'
text_0221.CN: '你很诚实。拿这个。告诉他我没有生气。

text_0222.EN: The small door opens. You may leave.
text_0222.CN: 小门打开了。你可以离开了。

text_0225.EN: You walk out of the small chamber quietly.

text_0226.EN: You lunge at the child. He screams.
text_0226.CN: 你冲向孩子。他尖叫起来。

text_0227.EN: The whole tomb shakes. Dark energy crushes you.
text_0227.CN: 整个坟墓都在震动。黑暗能量会摧毁你。

text_0228.EN: You are torn apart by the curse.

text_0229.EN: The boy vanishes, crying. You are thrown out of the chamber.
text_0229.CN: 男孩哭着消失了。你被赶出了密室。

text_0230.EN: \nA corpse curls in the corner, small and twisted.
text_0230.CN: \n一具尸体蜷缩在角落里，小而扭曲。

text_0231.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_0231.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_0245.EN: You cannot go back that easily.

text_0246.EN: Root of the cave? You are already deep enough.
text_0246.CN: 山洞的根部？你已经够深了。

text_0247.EN: Home? You left that behind long ago.
text_0247.CN: 家？你很久以前就把它抛在脑后了。

text_0253.EN: You die because you type something.
text_0253.CN: 你会因为输入某些内容而死亡。

text_0254.EN: \n...You gasp and open your eyes. It felt real.
text_0254.CN: \n...你喘着气，睁开眼睛。感觉很真实。

text_0257.EN: Permission denied. You are not the wizard.

text_0258.EN: Root access locked. Only the blood heir may enter.
text_0258.CN: 根访问权限已锁定。只有血统继承人可以进入。

text_0259.EN: Pages are already in your memory.
text_0259.CN: 页面已经在您的记忆中。

text_0260.EN: You cannot read the wall this way.
text_0260.CN: 你无法用这种方式读懂墙壁。

text_0261.CN: 屏幕清零。黑暗依然存在。

text_0262.EN: There is no exit. Only the cave.

text_0263.EN: A poor adventurer about to die.
text_0263.CN: 一个即将死去的可怜的冒险家。

text_0264.EN: Permission bits do not work on ghosts.
text_0264.CN: 权限位对幽灵不起作用。

text_0265.CN: 黑暗中的 64 个字节：时间=9999ms

text_0267.EN: System reboot failed. The curse prevents restart.
text_0267.CN: 系统重启失败。诅咒阻止重启。

text_0268.EN: You cannot shut the cave down.

text_0273.EN: You cannot kill what is already dead.
text_0273.CN: 你无法杀死已经死亡的东西。

text_0274.EN: Nice try. Ghost PID 1 is immortal.
text_0274.CN: 不错的尝试。幽灵PID 1是不朽的。

text_0276.EN: Most process: curse, fear, your slow death
text_0276.CN: 大多数过程：诅咒、恐惧、你的缓慢死亡

text_0277.EN: MANUAL: type anything and hope it works.
text_0277.CN: 手册：输入任何内容并希望它能起作用。

text_0278.EN: No editor here. The walls write their own story.
text_0278.CN: 这里没有编辑。墙壁书写着自己的故事。

text_0281.CN: 导入错误：没有名为“escape”的模块

text_0282.EN: Could not fetch packages. No internet in the cave.
text_0282.CN: 无法获取包。山洞里没有网络。

text_0285.EN: DNS cache flushed. You still remember the curse.
text_0285.CN: DNS 缓存已刷新。你还记得那个诅咒。

text_0286.EN: Network unreachable. Only ghosts have signal.
text_0286.CN: 网络无法访问。只有鬼才有信号。

text_0287.EN: Time does not exist down here.

text_0288.EN: Calendar blurred by dust. No day, no night.
text_0288.CN: 日历被灰尘模糊。没有白天，没有夜晚。

text_0289.CN: 免费使用的文件系统大小

text_0291.EN: No space left for your sanity.
text_0291.CN: 没有空间留给你的理智。

text_0295.CN: 什么也没找到。只有沉默。

text_0305.EN: ERROR: Access denied. Process is immortal.
text_0305.CN: 错误：访问被拒绝。过程是不朽的。

text_0310.EN: The maze only appears under full moonlight.
text_0310.CN: 迷宫只有在满月光下才会出现。

text_0312.EN: Silver light seeps through stone cracks.

text_0313.EN: Moon phases shift on the walls. Paths change with every step.
text_0313.CN: 墙壁上的月相发生变化。路径随着每一步而变化。

text_0314.EN: The maze will vanish when the moon fades.
text_0314.CN: 当月亮消失时，迷宫就会消失。

text_0315.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0315.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0316.EN: You step out of the maze.

text_0317.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0317.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0318.EN: Four shadow patterns on the ground: wolf, maiden, tree, crown.
text_0318.CN: 地上有四种影子图案：狼、少女、树、王冠。

text_0319.EN: Wall verse: 'First the beast that guards the night,
text_0319.CN: 墙上的诗句：“首先是守夜的野兽，

text_0320.EN: Then the maid who lost her light,

text_0321.EN: Last the root that holds the seal.'
text_0321.CN: 最后是保持封印的根部。

text_0322.EN: Type 'step [name]' to walk on a shadow.
text_0322.CN: 输入“步骤[名称]”在阴影上行走。

text_0323.EN: Stone door slides open. You enter the phase chamber.
text_0323.CN: 石门滑开。你进入相位室。

text_0324.CN: 你在银色的火焰下崩溃了。

text_0326.EN: Five stone plates on the wall, each carved a moon phase.
text_0326.CN: 墙壁上有五块石板，每块石板上都刻有月相。

text_0327.EN: They are: new, waxing, full, waning, crescent.
text_0327.CN: 它们是：新月、上弦月、满月、渐亏月、新月形。

text_0328.EN: Type 'press [phase]' to activate them in cycle order.
text_0328.CN: 键入“press [phase]”以按循环顺序激活它们。

text_0329.EN: All phases align. Final door reveals itself.
text_0329.CN: 所有阶段都对齐。最后一扇门显露出来。

text_0332.EN: A moon-shaped altar stands in the center.
text_0332.CN: 中央矗立着一座月亮形的祭坛。

text_0333.EN: Three digit lock below the crystal.
text_0333.CN: 水晶下方的三位数字锁。

text_0334.EN: Inscription: 'Count of phases, count of runes, count of lovers.'
text_0334.CN: 铭文：“阶段计数，符文计数，恋人计数。”

text_0335.EN: Type 'enter [code]' to try. Type 'pray' for a hint.
text_0335.CN: 输入“输入[代码]”进行尝试。输入“祈祷”以获得提示。

text_0336.EN: Moonlight whispers: 'Five shapes, three stones, two souls.'
text_0336.CN: 月光低语：“五种形状，三块石头，两个灵魂。”

text_0338.EN: Lock clicks. Crystal blooms with silver light.
text_0338.CN: 锁定点击。水晶绽放银色光芒。

text_0339.EN: The core chamber opens before you.

text_0340.EN: You go back to the road.

text_0346.EN: Cold wax smell fills your nose. Candles flicker weakly.
text_0346.CN: 鼻子里充满了冰冷的蜡味。蜡烛微弱地摇曳。

text_0347.EN: Seven human-shaped figures stand in a row, all wearing your face.
text_0347.CN: 七个人形人影站成一排，都戴着你的脸。

text_0348.EN: One of them is not wax. It is the first guardian.
text_0348.CN: 其中之一不是蜡。它是第一守护者。

text_0350.EN: Type 'choose [1-7]' when you know the answer.
text_0350.CN: 当您知道答案时，输入“选择 [1-7]”。

text_0351.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0351.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0352.EN: You turn and run out before the wax figures move.
text_0352.CN: 在蜡像移动之前，你转身跑了出去。

text_0355.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_0355.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_0356.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_0356.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_0358.EN: The figure's eyes open. It is not wax.
text_0358.CN: 人影睁开眼睛。它不是蜡。

text_0359.EN: 'You have my blood. You have come far.'
text_0359.CN: ‘你有我的血。你已经走了很远了。

text_0360.EN: The first guardian smiles and fades into dust.
text_0360.CN: 第一个守护者微笑着消失在尘埃中。

text_0361.EN: A stone door behind him opens slowly.
text_0361.CN: 他身后的一扇石门缓缓打开。

text_0362.EN: You go back to the tomb.

text_0363.EN: All candles blow out for a second.
text_0363.CN: 所有蜡烛都熄灭了一秒钟。

text_0364.EN: Wax hands drag you into the row.
text_0364.CN: 打蜡的手把你拖进队伍里。

text_0366.EN: You can not be birth forever!

text_0369.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_0372.CN: 未知命令。尝试“检查 1”或“选择 4”。

text_0373.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0373.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0375.EN: Rotting wax and cold stone fill your nose.
text_0375.CN: 腐烂的蜡和冰冷的石头充满了你的鼻子。

text_0376.EN: Six stone coffins stand in a circle.

text_0377.EN: A rusted pendulum swings slowly above, counting dead time.
text_0377.CN: 一个生锈的钟摆在上方缓慢摆动，计算着停滞时间。

text_0378.EN: One coffin holds the first guardian. The rest hold hunger.
text_0378.CN: 一口棺材里装有第一位守护者。其余的则保持饥饿。

text_0380.EN: Try examine |coffine| or listen pendulum or open |coffine|
text_0380.CN: 尝试检查|棺材|或听摆或开|棺材|

text_0381.EN: Still a way down, type down to go down.
text_0381.CN: 还有一段路要往下走，输入 down 就可以往下走。

text_0382.EN: You turn and walk out before the dead wake.
text_0382.CN: 在死者苏醒之前，你转身走出去。

text_0384.EN: The pendulum slows at the 4th coffin.
text_0384.CN: 钟摆在第四个棺材处减慢。

text_0385.EN: The small coffin slides aside, revealing a narrow passage down.
text_0385.CN: 小棺材滑到一边，露出一条狭窄的通道。

text_0386.EN: The door have already closed forever.

text_0387.EN: You feel faint warmth from inside. Not evil.
text_0387.CN: 你从里面感受到淡淡的温暖。不邪恶。

text_0391.EN: Warm light guides your eyes to the bronze ring mark.
text_0391.CN: 温暖的光线将您的视线引导至青铜环标记。

text_0392.EN: Not enough faith. The dead do not listen.

text_0393.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_0393.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_0394.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_0394.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_0396.EN: The lid opens silently. A body lies still, wearing your face.
text_0396.CN: 盖子无声地打开。一具尸体静静地躺着，戴着你的脸。

text_0397.EN: It holds a sealed letter in its hands.
text_0397.CN: 它手里拿着一封密封的信。

text_0398.EN: 'I chose this fate. Do not blame the seal. Do not blame her.'
text_0398.CN: '我选择了这个命运。不要责怪密封。不要责怪她。

text_0399.EN: 'Free us both. That is the only way.'
text_0399.CN: “释放我们俩。”这是唯一的方法。

text_0400.EN: The body fades into dust. A heavy stone door rumbles open behind.
text_0400.CN: 身体化为尘埃。一扇沉重的石门在后面隆隆地打开。

text_0401.EN: Deep, heavy breathing comes from the darkness beyond.
text_0401.CN: 远处的黑暗中传来深沉而沉重的呼吸声。

text_0402.EN: You hear faint gnawing sounds from inside.
text_0402.CN: 你听到里面传来微弱的啃咬声。

text_0403.EN: The dead drag you into the coffin.

text_0408.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_0411.EN: A huge stone chamber. A massive dwarf in rusted armor stands in the center.
text_0411.CN: 一座巨大的石室。一个穿着生锈盔甲的巨大矮人站在中央。

text_0412.EN: His eyes glow with corrupted red light. He grips a giant warhammer.
text_0412.CN: 他的眼睛闪烁着腐化的红光。他握着一把巨大的战锤。

text_0413.EN: He growls: Trespasser. Leave. Or die.
text_0413.CN: 他咆哮道：侵入者。离开。或者死掉。

text_0414.EN: Type talk / show toolkit / use holy amulet / attack dwarf / west
text_0414.CN: 输入对话/展示工具包/使用神圣护身符/攻击矮人/西方

text_0415.EN: You call his name. He freezes, like he's trying to remember something.
text_0415.CN: 你呼唤他的名字。他愣住了，好像在努力回忆什么。

text_0416.CN: 金布尔：……名字。我知道这个名字。

text_0417.EN: He shakes his head, growling louder. No! Lies! All lies!
text_0417.CN: 他摇摇头，咆哮得更大声。不！谎言！都是谎言！

text_0418.EN: He raises his hammer, ready to strike.

text_0419.EN: He's too far gone to listen. You'll need something to jog his memory.
text_0419.CN: 他已经走得太远了，听不进去。你需要一些东西来唤起他的记忆。

text_0420.EN: You hold up Bryn's toolkit. The dwarf stops moving.
text_0420.CN: 你举起布林的工具箱。矮人停止了动作。

text_0421.CN: 金布尔：布林……？布林的工具...

text_0422.EN: The red glow in his eyes flickers. For a second, he looks like himself again.
text_0422.CN: 他眼中的红色光芒闪烁。有那么一瞬间，他又看起来像他自己了。

text_0423.EN: Gimble: Tell him ... I'm sorry. For everything.
text_0423.CN: Gimble：告诉他……我很抱歉。对于一切。

text_0424.EN: He steps aside, revealing the passage behind him.
text_0424.CN: 他退到一边，露出身后的通道。

text_0425.EN: Gimble: Go. End this. Before I wake up again.
text_0425.CN: 金布尔：走吧。结束这一切。在我再次醒来之前。

text_0426.EN: You have nothing that he would recognize.
text_0426.CN: 你没有任何他能认出的东西。

text_0427.EN: You hold up the holy amulet. Pure light fills the chamber.
text_0427.CN: 你举起神圣的护身符。纯净的光线充满了房间。

text_0428.EN: The dwarf screams, but not in pain — in relief.
text_0428.CN: 矮人尖叫起来，但并不是因为疼痛——而是松了口气。

text_0429.EN: Gimble: Finally. Finally free from this rot.
text_0429.CN: 金布尔：最后。终于摆脱了这种腐烂。

text_0430.EN: He sets his hammer down gently. It glows with clean silver light.
text_0430.CN: 他轻轻放下锤子。它发出干净的银光。

text_0431.EN: Gimble: Take this. It was meant for the heir.
text_0431.CN: 金布尔：拿着这个。这是为继承人准备的。

text_0432.EN: He fades into motes of light, smiling at last.
text_0432.CN: 他消失在光点之中，最后微笑着。

text_0434.EN: Your heart is not pure enough. The amulet does not respond.
text_0434.CN: 你的心还不够纯洁。护身符没有反应。

text_0435.EN: You charge at the dwarf. He roars and swings his hammer!
text_0435.CN: 你向矮人冲锋。他咆哮着，挥舞着他的锤子！

text_0436.EN: Your weapon cuts through his corrupted armor!
text_0436.CN: 你的武器击穿了他腐化的盔甲！

text_0437.EN: You hit him, but it barely fazes him.
text_0437.CN: 你打了他，但他几乎没有惊慌。

text_0438.EN: His hammer slams into you! HP -2
text_0438.CN: 他的锤子砸向你！生命值-2

text_0439.EN: You block most of the blow. HP -1
text_0439.CN: 你挡住了大部分的打击。生命值-1

text_0440.EN: You retreat back to the mortuary.

text_0442.EN: The dwarf collapses with a heavy thud.

text_0443.EN: You take his warhammer from his hands. It still hums with dark power.
text_0443.CN: 你从他手中夺走了他的战锤。它仍然充满着黑暗力量。

text_0445.EN: His hammer crushes you. Everything goes dark.
text_0445.CN: 他的锤子会压碎你。一切都变暗了。

text_0446.EN: The dwarf growls, watching your every move.
text_0446.CN: 矮人咆哮着，注视着你的一举一动。

text_0447.EN: Unknown command. Try 'examine |coffine|' or 'listen pendulum' or 'open |coffine|'.
text_0447.CN: 未知命令。尝试“检查|棺材|”或“听钟摆”或“打开|棺材|”。

text_0450.EN: You step into a dark, ancient tomb.
text_0450.CN: 你走进一座黑暗、古老的坟墓。

text_0451.EN: The air is cold. Carvings on walls show your ancestors.
text_0451.CN: 空气很冷。墙上的雕刻展示了您的祖先。

text_0452.EN: Only blood of the family can pass here...
text_0452.CN: 只有家族的血脉才能在这里流淌……

text_0453.EN: You see here a new diary.
text_0453.CN: 你在这里看到一本新日记。

text_0454.EN: There is a deep shaft with some ledders, type down to go down!
text_0454.CN: 有一个很深的竖井，里面有一些ledders，向下输入就可以下去了！

text_0459.EN: In the center: a glowing altar.

text_0460.CN: 你在这里看到一个监护人。

text_0461.EN: You can challenge the guardian, if you lose, you will not die, but if you win, you will get something useful.
text_0461.CN: 你可以挑战守护者，如果你输了，你不会死，但如果你赢了，你会得到一些有用的东西。

text_0462.EN: You seem to want to sing or dance.

text_0463.EN: On the wall: a huge carving of a woman (your ancestor).
text_0463.CN: 墙上：一个巨大的女人雕刻（你的祖先）。

text_0465.EN: Son, if you find this diary, I have already died.
text_0465.CN: 儿子，如果你找到这本日记，我就已经死了。

text_0466.EN: I was not go on a holiday, I just go to the cave and control the Evil.
text_0466.CN: 我不是去度假，我只是去山洞控制邪恶。

text_0467.EN: I can not choose what to do, so you can do anything you want.
text_0467.CN: 我无法选择做什么，所以你可以做任何你想做的事。

text_0468.EN: You should have a magic key to end the curse, I find it and put it in my coffin.
text_0468.CN: 你应该有一把解除诅咒的魔法钥匙，我找到了它并把它放进了我的棺材里。

text_0469.EN: I wish you good luck, my son.

text_0470.EN: You do not want to go in again.

text_0479.EN: Light flows around you. Ancient figures appear.
text_0479.CN: 光在你周围流动。远古人物出现。

text_0480.EN: They are your ancestors, guardians of this place.
text_0480.CN: 他们是你的祖先，这个地方的守护者。

text_0481.EN: Choose: choose inherit / choose refuse / choose listen
text_0481.CN: 选择：选择继承/选择拒绝/选择聆听

text_0482.EN: You decide to carry on the duty of guardians.
text_0482.CN: 您决定履行监护人的职责。

text_0483.EN: All spirits salute you. Your power rises greatly.
text_0483.CN: 所有的灵魂都向你致敬。你的力量大幅提升。

text_0485.EN: You refuse the old fate and wish to end the cycle.
text_0485.CN: 你拒绝旧的命运并希望结束这个循环。

text_0486.EN: Ancestors send their blessings to you.

text_0488.EN: You listen to stories of the past.

text_0489.EN: You fully understand the pain of the ancient demon.
text_0489.CN: 你完全明白古魔的痛苦。

text_0490.EN: Your mind becomes calm and clear.
text_0490.CN: 你的头脑变得平静和清晰。

text_0492.EN: The trial is not open for you yet.

text_0493.EN: You sing a silly song in the tomb.
text_0493.CN: 你在坟墓里唱着一首愚蠢的歌。

text_0494.CN: 一个鬼魂大喊：“请停止唱歌！”

text_0495.EN: You eat the candy. Ghosts stare at you hungrily.
text_0495.CN: 你吃糖果。鬼魂饥饿地盯着你。

text_0496.EN: You have no candy to eat.

text_0497.EN: You float and howl like a ghost. Real ghosts laugh at you.
text_0497.CN: 你像幽灵一样漂浮并嚎叫。真正的鬼魂会嘲笑你。

text_0498.EN: You tickle the guardian. He can't stop laughing and steps aside.
text_0498.CN: 你惹恼了监护人。他笑得停不下来，走到一边。

text_0499.EN: You offer food to ghosts. They shake heads, they can't eat anything.
text_0499.CN: 你给鬼魂提供食物。他们摇头，他们什么也吃不了。

text_0500.EN: You ask the ghost why it lives here.
text_0500.CN: 你问鬼魂为什么住在这里。

text_0501.EN: Ghost: 'Rent is cheap, and it’s quiet... mostly.'
text_0501.CN: 幽灵：“房租很便宜，而且很安静……大部分时间。”

text_0502.EN: You ask if the tomb has wifi.

text_0503.EN: Ghost: 'We use spirit signals, no internet needed!'
text_0503.CN: 幽灵：“我们使用精神信号，不需要互联网！”

text_0504.EN: You tell a ghost joke: 'What do you call a ghost that can’t lie?'
text_0504.CN: 你讲一个鬼笑话：“你怎么称呼不会说谎的鬼？”

text_0505.CN: 鬼魂：“一个彻头彻尾的骗子！”

text_0506.EN: You ask the ghost’s favorite dessert.
text_0506.CN: 你问鬼魂最喜欢的甜点。

text_0508.EN: You ask if ghosts like elevators.

text_0509.CN: 幽灵：“是的，他们振奋了我们的精神。”

text_0510.EN: You ask why ghosts don’t use social media.
text_0510.CN: 你问为什么鬼魂不使用社交媒体。

text_0511.EN: Ghost: 'Too many trolls, and we’re already ghosts.'
text_0511.CN: 幽灵：“巨魔太多了，我们已经是幽灵了。”

text_0512.EN: You ask if ghosts party here.
text_0512.CN: 你问这里是否有鬼魂聚会。

text_0513.CN: 鬼魂：“这个坟墓是我们永恒的狂欢。”

text_0514.EN: You ask if ghosts are good at math.

text_0515.CN: 幽灵：“不，透明的东西太多了。”

text_0516.EN: You ask if ghosts fall in love.

text_0517.CN: 幽灵：“只和他们的食尸鬼朋友在一起。”

text_0518.EN: You ask the ghost to do your homework.

text_0520.EN: You tell a joke to the guardian.

text_0521.EN: Guardian: '...That was worse than my death.'
text_0521.CN: 监护人：“……那比我的死更糟糕。”

text_0522.EN: You move stiffly like a robot. Ghosts mimic your silly moves.
text_0522.CN: 你像机器人一样僵硬地移动。鬼魂会模仿你的愚蠢举动。

text_0523.EN: You race with ghosts. They float super fast and win easily.
text_0523.CN: 你与鬼魂赛跑。他们漂浮速度超快，轻松获胜。

text_0524.EN: You beg for snacks. The guardian rolls his eyes.
text_0524.CN: 你乞求零食。守护者翻白眼。

text_0525.EN: You say hello to ghosts. They wave back lazily.
text_0525.CN: 你向鬼魂打招呼。他们懒洋洋地挥手回应。

text_0526.EN: You tease the guardian. He crosses arms and refuses to talk.
text_0526.CN: 你戏弄监护人。他交叉双臂，拒绝说话。

text_0527.EN: You play hide and seek. Ghosts find you instantly.
text_0527.CN: 你玩捉迷藏。鬼魂立即找到你。

text_0528.EN: You march back and forth. Ghosts watch you curiously.
text_0528.CN: 你来回走动。鬼魂好奇地看着你。

text_0529.EN: You blow a whistle. The whole tomb rings with sound.
text_0529.CN: 你吹口哨。整个坟墓都响起了声音。

text_0530.EN: You bow to the coffins. A faint rustle replies.
text_0530.CN: 你向棺材鞠躬。一阵微弱的沙沙声回答道。

text_0531.EN: You yawn loudly. Even ghosts feel sleepy.
text_0531.CN: 你打哈欠很大声。就连鬼魂也会感到困倦。

text_0532.EN: You kiss the ghost! It shouts: WHAT ARE YOU DOING!!!
text_0532.CN: 你亲吻鬼魂！它喊道：你在做什么！！！

text_0533.EN: You whistle loudly. Ghosts cover their ears.
text_0533.CN: 你大声吹口哨。鬼魂捂住耳朵。

text_0534.EN: You wave at the ancestor carving. It seems to wave back.
text_0534.CN: 您向祖先雕刻挥手致意。似乎在挥手回报。

text_0535.EN: You dance in the tomb. The guardian sighs.
text_0535.CN: 你在坟墓里跳舞。守护者叹了口气。

text_0537.EN: You make weird noises. Ghosts cover their ears.
text_0537.CN: 你发出奇怪的声音。鬼魂捂住耳朵。

text_0539.EN: It holds an old locket and a final diary.
text_0539.CN: 里面有一个旧挂坠盒和一本最后的日记。

text_0542.EN: 'We are all bound here. The cycle ends only when we accept who we are.'
text_0542.CN: “我们都被束缚在这里。只有当我们接受自己是谁时，这个循环才会结束。

text_0543.EN: 'You are not a treasure hunter. You are the heir.'
text_0543.CN: “你不是一个寻宝者。你是继承人。

text_0545.EN: You kneel and pray for your ancestors.
text_0545.CN: 你跪下来为你的祖先祈祷。

text_0550.EN: Inside: bones and a broken amulet. And a magic key.
text_0550.CN: 里面：骨头和破损的护身符。还有一把魔法钥匙。

text_0552.EN: You take away the magic key.

text_0553.EN: You leave the tomb and return to the end of road.
text_0553.CN: 你离开坟墓，回到路的尽头。

text_0554.EN: You burp loudly. A ghost says: 'So rude!'
text_0554.CN: 你打嗝声很大。鬼魂说：“太粗鲁了！”

text_0555.EN: You sing Baby Shark. All ghosts run away.
text_0555.CN: 你唱《鲨鱼宝宝》。所有的鬼魂都逃跑了。

text_0556.EN: You hide behind a stone. Ghosts pretend not to see you.
text_0556.CN: 你躲在一块石头后面。鬼魂假装没有看到你。

text_0557.EN: You blow a kiss to the ghost. They float away, they are shy!
text_0557.CN: 你向鬼魂飞吻。它们飘走了，它们很害羞！

text_0558.EN: You take a short nap. Ghosts watch you sleep.
text_0558.CN: 你小睡一会儿。鬼魂看着你睡觉。

text_0559.EN: You speak the truth: 'I know who I am.'
text_0559.CN: 你说的是实话：“我知道我是谁。”

text_0560.EN: The tomb shakes. The walls show all your past lives.
text_0560.CN: 坟墓震动。墙壁展示了你所有的前世。

text_0563.EN: You try to film a TikTok in the tomb.
text_0563.CN: 你尝试在坟墓里拍摄一段 TikTok。

text_0564.EN: All ghosts hide quickly. They are shy!
text_0564.CN: 所有鬼魂都迅速躲藏起来。他们很害羞！

text_0571.EN: Thick fog covers the marsh. Every step is dangerous.
text_0571.CN: 浓雾笼罩着沼泽。每一步都是危险的。

text_0572.EN: TYPE ‘quest’ for a quest, and if you are in a quest, type talk to talk to the ghost, ask past to ask past, ask for xxxxxxxx
text_0572.CN: 输入“quest”进行任务，如果您正在执行任务，请输入 talk 与幽灵交谈，询问过去询问过去，询问 xxxxxxxx

text_0573.EN: Danger rises at night. Toxins grow stronger.
text_0573.CN: 夜间危险会增加。毒素越来越强。

text_0574.EN: You notice a swamp herb growing near the entrance.
text_0574.CN: 你注意到入口附近生长着一种沼泽草本。

text_0576.EN: A voice booms: You can only eat it in the swamp.
text_0576.CN: 一个声音响起：你只能在沼泽里吃它。

text_0577.EN: You see a deep hole with some runed rope, type down to go down.
text_0577.CN: 你会看到一个深洞，里面有一些绳索，输入“down”即可下去。

text_0578.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0578.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0580.EN: You walk out of the swamp and return to the forest.

text_0581.EN: You do not want to go in again.

text_0582.EN: Fog blocks your sight. Dim glimmers flicker in the distance.
text_0582.CN: 雾挡住了你的视线。远处闪烁着暗淡的光芒。

text_0584.EN: Bring 3 lilies to help it rest
text_0584.CN: 带3朵百合花来帮助它休息

text_0585.EN: Type find lily to find lily.
text_0585.CN: 输入 find lily 来查找 lily。

text_0586.EN: Type turn in if you find three lily.
text_0586.CN: 如果找到三朵百合，请输入“turn”。

text_0587.EN: You found a pure white lily. It emits soft light.
text_0587.CN: 你发现了一朵纯白的百合。它发出柔和的光。

text_0588.EN: You found a lily and a crystal dewdrop!
text_0588.CN: 你发现了一朵百合和一颗水晶露珠！

text_0589.EN: A voice booms: You can only use the dewdrop in the swamp.
text_0589.CN: 一个声音响起：你只能在沼泽中使用露珠。

text_0590.EN: Type use dewdrop to use it.
text_0590.CN: 输入 use dewdrop 来使用它。

text_0591.EN: A spirit guides you to a lily, blessing you.
text_0591.CN: 神灵引导你走向百合，祝福你。

text_0592.EN: You walk past small frogs, they hop playfully away.
text_0592.CN: 你走过小青蛙，它们顽皮地跳开。

text_0593.EN: Crystal dewdrop melts into warm healing light.
text_0593.CN: 水晶露珠融化成温暖的治愈之光。

text_0594.EN: The spirit holds the lilies close, its form grows brighter.
text_0594.CN: 神灵将百合花紧紧抱住，它的形状变得更加明亮。

text_0595.EN: Thank you for your kindness. Take this gift as my gratitude.
text_0595.CN: 谢谢你的好意。收下这份礼物作为我的谢意。

text_0596.EN: The ghost gives you a swamp pendant.
text_0596.CN: 鬼魂给了你一个沼泽吊坠。

text_0597.EN: Now, you can choose an ending of swamp. Type swamp ending / peace leave / drain spirit to choose an ending.
text_0597.CN: 现在，你可以选择沼泽的结局。输入沼泽结局/和平休假/汲取精神来选择结局。

text_0598.EN: Find lilies, help the spirit, and the swamp will bless you.
text_0598.CN: 找到百合花，帮助灵魂，沼泽就会祝福你。

text_0600.EN: The swamp is purified! All toxins fade away.
text_0600.CN: 沼泽被净化了！所有的毒素都会消失。

text_0601.EN: A voice booms: Thank you, mortal. I will give you a gift.
text_0601.CN: 一个声音响起：谢谢你，凡人。我会给你一份礼物。

text_0602.CN: 您会收到一把魔法钥匙。

text_0603.EN: Mortrol, you can break the curse now.
text_0603.CN: Mortrol，你现在可以打破诅咒了。

text_0605.EN: The swamp calms. You leave without curse or harm.
text_0605.CN: 沼泽平静了。你离开时没有受到诅咒或伤害。

text_0606.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_0606.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_0607.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_0607.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_0610.EN: You drain the spirit’s power. The swamp darkens.
text_0610.CN: 你耗尽了灵魂的力量。沼泽变暗了。

text_0612.CN: 你找到了一种沼泽药草。

text_0613.CN: 除了泥土，你什么也找不到。

text_0614.EN: You aid a trapped swamp spirit.
text_0614.CN: 你帮助被困的沼泽精灵。

text_0615.EN: You drain power from the spirit.

text_0616.EN: The floating spirit drifts closer, its voice soft and sad.
text_0616.CN: 浮魂渐渐靠近，声音轻柔而悲伤。

text_0617.EN: I was a traveler long ago. I lost my way in this swamp.
text_0617.CN: 很久以前我是一个旅行者。我在这片沼泽里迷了路。

text_0618.EN: I knew the guardian of the cave, your ancestors. We were old friends.
text_0618.CN: 我认识这个洞穴的守护者，你的祖先。我们是老朋友了。

text_0619.EN: I chose to stay here, guarding this misty land, so no one else gets trapped.
text_0619.CN: 我选择留在这里，守护着这片迷雾之地，不让其他人被困住。

text_0620.EN: The lilies you collect are flowers I loved when I was alive.
text_0620.CN: 你收集的百合花是我生前喜爱的花。

text_0621.EN: Under the full moon, old memories become warm.
text_0621.CN: 月光下，旧日的记忆变得温暖。

text_0622.EN: Past days... I watched countless people come and go.
text_0622.CN: 过去的日子……我看着无数人来来去去。

text_0623.EN: Most chased treasure in the cave, few noticed the pain hidden there.
text_0623.CN: 大多数人都在山洞里追逐宝藏，很少有人注意到那里隐藏着的痛苦。

text_0624.EN: I wait here, hoping someone can end the endless cycle one day.
text_0624.CN: 我在这里等待，希望有一天有人能够结束这无尽的循环。

text_0625.EN: Spirit: I was her handmaiden, when she was still human.
text_0625.CN: 精灵：当她还是人类时，我是她的侍女。

text_0626.EN: Spirit: The lady was kind. She never hurt anyone.\n
text_0626.CN: 精神：这位女士很友善。她从未伤害过任何人。\n

text_0628.EN: Spirit: When she was sealed away, I chose to stay here.
text_0628.CN: 灵魂：当她被封印时，我选择留在这里。

text_0629.EN: Spirit: I waited for someone to set her free\n
text_0629.CN: 灵魂：我等待有人释放她\n

text_0630.EN: Spirit: You have her eyes. You really are her descendant.
text_0630.CN: 精神：你有她的眼睛。你果然是她的后裔。

text_0631.EN: Spirit: Please, be gentle with her. She's suffered enough.\n
text_0631.CN: 精神：请对她温柔一些。她受够了。\n

text_0632.EN: The spirit floats silently among the lilies.
text_0632.CN: 灵魂静静地漂浮在百合花丛中。

text_0635.EN: You are swallowed by the swamp...

text_0637.EN: Welcome, dev tester! You can cheat here.
text_0637.CN: 欢迎，开发测试人员！你可以在这里作弊。

text_0638.EN: Commands: heal, max, runes, godmode, leave
text_0638.CN: 命令：治愈、最大、符文、上帝模式、离开

text_0649.EN: A crumbling stone tower stands here. Climb steps to reach the top.
text_0649.CN: 一座摇摇欲坠的石塔矗立在这里。爬上台阶到达顶部。

text_0650.CN: 风从破碎的窗户呼啸而过。

text_0651.EN: Type up or down and look to play.
text_0651.CN: 向上或向下键入并查看游戏。

text_0653.EN: You climb to FLOOR 2. Dust and old ropes cover the walls.
text_0653.CN: 你爬到二楼。墙壁上布满了灰尘和旧绳索。

text_0654.EN: You climb to FLOOR 3. A small window overlooks the forest.
text_0654.CN: 你爬到三楼。一扇小窗户可以俯瞰森林。

text_0655.EN: You climb to FLOOR 4. A ghost sits quietly, watching the view.
text_0655.CN: 你爬到四楼。一个鬼魂静静地坐着，看着风景。

text_0656.EN: Type ask story to ask past.
text_0656.CN: 输入“询问故事”来询问过去。

text_0657.EN: You reach the TOP FLOOR! A huge panorama unfolds.
text_0657.CN: 您到达顶层了！一幅巨大的全景展开。

text_0658.EN: You are already at the top!

text_0659.EN: You are already at the bottom.

text_0660.EN: Old wooden door, broken stairs. Climb to go up.
text_0660.CN: 旧木门，破损的楼梯。爬上去。

text_0661.EN: Faint carvings on the wall: 'The view sets you free'.
text_0661.CN: 墙上的淡淡雕刻：“景色让你自由”。

text_0662.EN: You see the swamp, forest, and camp from here.
text_0662.CN: 从这里你可以看到沼泽、森林和营地。

text_0663.EN: A ghost stares at the horizon. It doesn't want to hurt you.
text_0663.CN: 一个幽灵凝视着地平线。它不想伤害你。

text_0665.CN: 废弃的了望塔 - 顶部

text_0668.CN: 森林（东部）→ 迷雾沼泽

text_0669.CN: 闹鬼的小屋（西）→ 祭坛和黑暗的洞穴

text_0670.CN: 废弃营地（南）→ 墓地&古墓

text_0671.EN: This watchtower stands in the north.
text_0671.CN: 这座瞭望塔矗立在北方。

text_0672.EN: \nFull world map unlocked! You know every path now.
text_0672.CN: \n完整世界地图已解锁！你现在知道每条路了。

text_0673.EN: You found a bird feather. Type 'give feather' to hand it over to the ghost below.
text_0673.CN: 你发现了一根鸟羽毛。输入“给予羽毛”将其交给下面的幽灵。

text_0674.EN: Ghost: I was the wizard's apprentice, long ago.
text_0674.CN: 鬼魂：很久以前，我是巫师的学徒。

text_0675.EN: Ghost: I watched him seal the one he loved. I couldn't stop him.\n
text_0675.CN: 幽灵：我看着他封印了他所爱的人。我无法阻止他。\n

text_0677.EN: Ghost: He told me to watch over the land, wait for his descendant.
text_0677.CN: 鬼：他让我守护这片土地，等待他的子孙。

text_0678.EN: Ghost: I waited. Hundreds of winters passed.\n
text_0678.CN: 幽灵：我等了。数百个冬天过去了。\n

text_0679.EN: Ghost: He was not a bad man. He was just too scared to lose her.
text_0679.CN: 幽灵：他不是一个坏人。他只是太害怕失去她了。

text_0680.EN: Ghost: Don't judge him too harshly.\n

text_0681.EN: The ghost goes back to staring at the horizon.
text_0681.CN: 鬼魂又继续凝视着地平线。

text_0682.EN: The ghost does not want to fight with you and your hit do not hurt her.
text_0682.CN: 鬼魂不想与你战斗，你的击打也不会伤害她。

text_0683.EN: The ghost smiles. It slowly fades away in peace.
text_0683.CN: 鬼魂微笑着。它在平静中慢慢消失。

text_0684.EN: You have no feather to give.

text_0685.EN: You leave the watchtower and return to the road.
text_0685.CN: 你离开了望塔，回到了路上。

text_0688.EN: A blinding light surrounds you. You have ascended to heaven.
text_0688.CN: 耀眼的光芒围绕着你。你已经升入天堂了。

text_0689.EN: Angels sing in the distance. The air is pure and peaceful.
text_0689.CN: 天使在远方歌唱。空气纯净而宁静。

text_0690.EN: You have broken the cycle of death and rebirth.
text_0690.CN: 你已经打破了死亡和重生的循环。

text_0691.EN: You now relised that your great-great grandfather the wizard is in fact a god.
text_0691.CN: 你现在认识到你的曾曾祖父巫师实际上是一位神。

text_0692.EN: He create this world, and all of the diarys, just to exam you. Now you pass it.
text_0692.CN: 他创造这个世界，以及所有的日记，只是为了检验你。现在你通过了。

text_0694.EN: Now, you must decide the fate of all souls.
text_0694.CN: 现在，你必须决定所有灵魂的命运。

text_0703.EN: Countless angels gather here, praising the light.
text_0703.CN: 无数天使聚集于此，赞美光明。

text_0704.CN: 一位大天使正在接近你。

text_0705.EN: 'You have proven yourself worthy. What do you seek?'
text_0705.CN: “你已经证明了自己的价值。你想要什么？

text_0706.EN: Choose: ask for power / ask for peace / ask for forgiveness
text_0706.CN: 选择：请求权力/请求和平/请求宽恕

text_0707.EN: The archangel grants you divine power.
text_0707.CN: 大天使赐予你神圣的力量。

text_0709.CN: 大天使祝福所有的灵魂。

text_0710.EN: All ghosts in the mortal world find peace.
text_0710.CN: 凡间一切鬼魂皆得安宁。

text_0713.EN: Books containing all knowledge of the universe line the walls.
text_0713.CN: 墙壁上排列着包含宇宙所有知识的书籍。

text_0714.EN: You find a book titled 'The True History of the Curse'.
text_0714.CN: 你找到一本名为“诅咒的真实历史”的书。

text_0715.EN: It reveals that the wizard and his wife were not the first.
text_0715.CN: 它表明巫师和他的妻子并不是第一个。

text_0716.EN: The cycle has repeated for thousands of years.
text_0716.CN: 这个循环已经重复了数千年。

text_0717.EN: But you are the first to break it.
text_0717.CN: 但你是第一个打破它的人。

text_0720.EN: The source of all light and life.
text_0720.CN: 所有光明和生命的源泉。

text_0721.EN: You see the Creator sitting on a throne of stars.
text_0721.CN: 你看到造物主坐在星星的宝座上。

text_0722.EN: 'You have done well, my child. Now, what will you do?'
text_0722.CN: ‘你做得很好，我的孩子。现在，你会做什么？

text_0723.EN: Choose: become a god / return to earth / create a new world
text_0723.CN: 选择：成神/回归地球/创造新世界

text_0725.EN: You become a god, watching over all worlds.
text_0725.CN: 你成为神，监视着所有的世界。

text_0726.EN: You ensure that no one ever suffers like your family did.
text_0726.CN: 您确保没有人像您的家人一样遭受苦难。

text_0730.EN: You can final see what you can cheat:
text_0730.CN: 你最终可以看到你能作弊什么：

text_0735.CN: -c、-C、-cheat 启用作弊模式（所有项目）

text_0738.EN: And, do you know, when you are at the ng one, you can type garry in the house, then you will win!
text_0738.CN: 而且，你知道吗，当你在ng的时候，你可以在房子里输入garry，那么你就赢了！

text_0739.EN: Also, you can type colin, and woody and garry in the house, then you will pass the ng one.\n
text_0739.CN: 另外，你可以在房子里输入 colin、woody 和 garry，然后你就会通过 ng 。\n

text_0740.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_0743.EN: You choose to return to earth and live a normal life.
text_0743.CN: 你选择返回地球，过上正常的生活。

text_0744.EN: You marry, have children, and die peacefully.
text_0744.CN: 你结婚，生子，然后安详地死去。

text_0749.EN: You can final see what you can cheat:
text_0749.CN: 你最终可以看到你能作弊什么：

text_0754.CN: -c、-C、-cheat 启用作弊模式（所有项目）

text_0757.EN: And, do you know, when you are at the ng one, you can type garry in the house, then you will win!
text_0757.CN: 而且，你知道吗，当你在ng的时候，你可以在房子里输入garry，那么你就赢了！

text_0758.EN: Also, you can type colin, and woody and garry in the house, then you will pass the ng one.\n
text_0758.CN: 另外，你可以在房子里输入 colin、woody 和 garry，然后你就会通过 ng 。\n

text_0759.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_0762.EN: You create a new world where love and peace reign.
text_0762.CN: 你创造了一个充满爱与和平的新世界。

text_0763.EN: No more pain, no more suffering, no more cycles.
text_0763.CN: 不再有疼痛，不再有苦难，不再有循环。

text_0767.EN: You can final see what you can cheat:
text_0767.CN: 你最终可以看到你能作弊什么：

text_0772.CN: -c、-C、-cheat 启用作弊模式（所有项目）

text_0775.EN: And, do you know, when you are at the ng one, you can type garry in the house, then you will win!
text_0775.CN: 而且，你知道吗，当你在ng的时候，你可以在房子里输入garry，那么你就赢了！

text_0776.EN: Also, you can type colin, and woody and garry in the house, then you will pass the ng one.\n
text_0776.CN: 另外，你可以在房子里输入 colin、woody 和 garry，然后你就会通过 ng 。\n

text_0777.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_0779.EN: You return to the mortal world.

text_0781.CN: 所有的灵魂都聚集在你面前。

text_0782.CN: 你必须决定他们的命运。

text_0783.EN: Choose: judge all / forgive all / let them choose
text_0783.CN: 选择：审判所有人/原谅所有人/让他们选择

text_0785.EN: You judge each soul based on their deeds.
text_0785.CN: 你根据每个灵魂的行为来评判他们。

text_0786.EN: Good souls go to heaven, evil souls go to hell.
text_0786.CN: 善人上天堂，恶人下地狱。

text_0787.EN: Balance is restored to the universe.

text_0789.EN: You forgive all souls, regardless of their deeds.
text_0789.CN: 你宽恕所有的灵魂，无论他们的行为如何。

text_0790.EN: Everyone is given a second chance.
text_0790.CN: 每个人都有第二次机会。

text_0793.EN: You let each soul choose their own fate.
text_0793.CN: 你让每个灵魂选择自己的命运。

text_0794.EN: Some choose heaven, some choose hell, some choose to reincarnate.
text_0794.CN: 有的人选择天堂，有的人选择地狱，有的人选择投胎。

text_0795.EN: True freedom is the greatest gift.
text_0795.CN: 真正的自由是最伟大的礼物。

text_0797.EN: You have completed all four runs of Death Adventure.
text_0797.CN: 您已完成全部四轮死亡冒险。

text_0801.EN: You can final see what you can cheat:
text_0801.CN: 你最终可以看到你能作弊什么：

text_0806.CN: -c、-C、-cheat 启用作弊模式（所有项目）

text_0809.EN: And, do you know, when you are at the ng one, you can type garry in the house, then you will win!
text_0809.CN: 而且，你知道吗，当你在ng的时候，你可以在房子里输入garry，那么你就赢了！

text_0810.EN: Also, you can type colin, and woody and garry in the house, then you will pass the ng one.\n
text_0810.CN: 另外，你可以在房子里输入 colin、woody 和 garry，然后你就会通过 ng 。\n

text_0811.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_0813.EN: Wait, where is the 6? I only have five!
text_0813.CN: 等等，6 号在哪里？我只有五个！

text_0814.EN: However, you find a titan in the secret room.
text_0814.CN: 然而，你在密室里发现了一个泰坦。

text_0816.EN: A strong light wraps you. You travel back to the past.
text_0816.CN: 强烈的光芒包裹着你。你回到过去。

text_0817.EN: You see the young wizard & his wife before the curse...
text_0817.CN: 你在诅咒之前看到了年轻的巫师和他的妻子......

text_0818.CN: 你可以改变他们的命运。

text_0820.EN: A quiet village. Young wizard is reading, his lover sits beside him.
text_0820.CN: 一个安静的村庄。年轻的巫师正在读书，他的爱人坐在他旁边。

text_0821.EN: You tell them about the future curse.
text_0821.CN: 你告诉他们未来的诅咒。

text_0822.EN: The young wizard looks scared: 'I will never hurt her...'
text_0822.CN: 年轻的巫师看起来很害怕：“我永远不会伤害她……”

text_0825.EN: Evil men hurt the wizard’s wife. She is dying.
text_0825.CN: 邪恶的人伤害了巫师的妻子。她快死了。

text_0826.EN: You save her! The tragedy is avoided!
text_0826.CN: 你救救她吧！悲剧就避免了！

text_0827.EN: You do nothing. She turns into a succubus.
text_0827.CN: 你什么也不做。她变成了魅魔。

text_0831.EN: You stop the seal. No curse. No pain.
text_0831.CN: 你停止封印。没有诅咒。没有疼痛。

text_0832.EN: The family cycle is BROKEN FOREVER.

text_0834.CN: 历史依然存在。诅咒仍在继续。

text_0836.EN: You unite two souls. Love defeats everything.
text_0836.CN: 你将两个灵魂结合在一起。爱可以战胜一切。

text_0837.EN: THIS IS THE ULTIMATE ENDING OF THE GAME.

text_0838.EN: Choose: stop seal / let seal / unite
text_0838.CN: 选择：停止封印/让封印/联合

text_0877.EN: You are now at the bottom of the hill, type climb to climb, look to look around.
text_0877.CN: 你现在已经到了山脚下，输入“climb”进行攀爬，“look”进行环顾四周。

text_0878.EN: You climb up the mountain, you see a statue of a wizard and still a lot of stairs up the mountain.
text_0878.CN: 你爬上山，你会看到一个巫师的雕像，还有很多楼梯上山。

text_0879.EN: There is still some very old stairs to the top.
text_0879.CN: 仍然有一些非常古老的楼梯通往顶部。

text_0880.EN: You climb up the old stairs, you see an arrow shoot at you by it self!
text_0880.CN: 你爬上旧楼梯，你看到一支箭正在向你射来！

text_0882.EN: You was killed by the arrow.

text_0883.EN: You see here a book, so you pick it up. Type read book to read it.
text_0883.CN: 你在这里看到一本书，所以你拿起它。输入“read book”即可阅读。

text_0884.EN: There is nothing, just a lot of mud.
text_0884.CN: 什么也没有，只有很多泥巴。

text_0885.EN: You are at the top of the hill, the view is amazing here.
text_0885.CN: 你在山顶，这里的景色令人惊叹。

text_0887.EN: There is nothing special expect the brilliant view.
text_0887.CN: 除了美丽的景色之外，没有什么特别的。

text_0891.EN: Hahaha, man, if you read my book, you must have see my arrow trap!
text_0891.CN: 哈哈哈，老兄，如果你看过我的书，你一定看到我的箭陷阱了！

text_0892.EN: Man, I am the human who killed wizard wife.\n
text_0892.CN: 老兄，我就是杀死巫师妻子的人类。\n

text_0894.EN: I kill she because her husband -- the wizard is not a good man.
text_0894.CN: 我杀了她是因为她的丈夫——巫师不是一个好人。

text_0895.EN: Let me tell you about him.\n
text_0895.CN: 让我告诉你关于他的事。\n

text_0897.EN: He is the most powerful wizard in the world, but he did not do a lot of good things.
text_0897.CN: 他是世界上最强大的巫师，但他并没有做很多好事。

text_0898.EN: For example, he killed a man who just laughed at his clothes!\n
text_0898.CN: 比如说，他杀了一个只是嘲笑他衣服的人！\n

text_0900.EN: He is so evil, and I am his employee.
text_0900.CN: 他太邪恶了，而我却是他的雇员。

text_0901.EN: I was angry with his rude, so I killed his wife.\n
text_0901.CN: 我对他的无礼很生气，所以我杀了他的妻子。\n

text_0902.EN: The last page of the book:

text_0903.EN: His wife became a succubus, but she did not kill me, the one who killed me is in fact the wizard!
text_0903.CN: 他的妻子变成了魅魔，但她并没有杀我，杀我的其实是巫师！

text_0904.EN: Then, he told people to build a statue and the stone in the church just to let people know that he is a good man!\n
text_0904.CN: 然后他就叫人在教堂里立个雕像和石头，就是为了让人们知道他是一个好人！\n

text_0906.EN: Just a way back to the campsite.

text_0907.EN: The statue may have been here for hundreds of years, it have a faint light surround it.
text_0907.CN: 这座雕像可能已经存在了数百年了，它周围有微弱的光芒。

text_0908.EN: An invisible arrow trap and a lot of mud.
text_0908.CN: 一个看不见的箭陷阱和大量的泥土。

text_0909.CN: 没什么特别的，只是一些蝴蝶。

text_0911.EN: You climb down the hill and back to the road.

text_0912.EN: You climb down the mountain, you are at the bottom of the mountain again.
text_0912.CN: 你爬下山，又到了山脚下。

text_0913.EN: You climb down the old stairs, you find an arrow is ready to shoot again!
text_0913.CN: 你爬下旧楼梯，你发现一支箭又准备射了！

text_0918.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0918.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0919.EN: You see a dart trap. A poisoned dart shoots at you.
text_0919.CN: 你看到一个飞镖陷阱。有毒的飞镖向你射击。

text_0923.EN: The key is fake! It breaks inside the lock.
text_0923.CN: 关键是假的！它在锁内部破裂。

text_0925.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_0925.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_0929.EN: You succeed in unlock the grate. There is a path to the west.
text_0929.CN: 您成功解锁了格栅。有一条路向西。

text_0930.EN: You see here a small library, type library to go in.
text_0930.CN: 你看到这里有一个小图书馆，类型库进去。

text_0931.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0931.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0932.EN: There is a stone path to west.

text_0933.EN: And there is also a sewer.

text_0934.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0934.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0935.EN: The way back is collapsed! You can't return unless you have a pick-axe.
text_0935.CN: 回去的路塌了！除非你有镐，否则你无法返回。

text_0936.EN: YOU DUG A PATH BACK TO THE HOUSE!
text_0936.CN: 你挖了一条回房子的路！

text_0938.EN: YOU NEED A PICKAXE TO DIG!
text_0938.CN: 您需要一把镐才能挖掘！

text_0939.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_0939.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_0940.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_0940.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_0942.EN: Bookshelves full of diaries, all written by your ancestors.
text_0942.CN: 书架上摆满了日记，都是你祖先写的。

text_0945.EN: The wizard loved his wife more than anything.
text_0945.CN: 巫师爱他的妻子胜过一切。

text_0946.EN: He sealed her to save the world, but hated himself for it.
text_0946.CN: 他封印了她以拯救世界，却因此憎恨自己。

text_0947.EN: Every guardian since has hated their fate.
text_0947.CN: 此后的每一位守护者都痛恨自己的命运。

text_0949.EN: You see every guardian’s life, every pain, every choice.
text_0949.CN: 你看到每个守护者的生活、每一次痛苦、每一个选择。

text_0951.EN: You took a BOOK OF ANCESTOR MEMORIES.
text_0951.CN: 你拿走了一本祖先记忆之书。

text_0953.EN: You crawl into a DARK SEWER TUNNEL.
text_0953.CN: 你爬进黑暗的下水道隧道。

text_0954.EN: You see here something is shinning in the deep.
text_0954.CN: 你看到这里深处有东西在闪闪发光。

text_0955.EN: TYPE deep OR GO DEEP to go deep.
text_0955.CN: 键入 deep 或 GO DEEP 即可深入。

text_0956.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0956.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0958.EN: You climb back to the cave path.

text_0959.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_0959.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_0960.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_0960.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_0966.EN: You read the note, it says:
text_0966.CN: 你读了这张纸条，上面写着：

text_0968.EN: I have been waiting for 200 years.

text_0969.EN: I have to wait, until someone broke the curse.
text_0969.CN: 我必须等待，直到有人打破诅咒。

text_0970.EN: My husband control me, but he is not evil. He just do not want me to destroy the world.
text_0970.CN: 我的丈夫控制着我，但他并不邪恶。他只是不想让我毁灭世界。

text_0972.EN: You realise that this note was written by you great-great grandmothe -- the Evil.
text_0972.CN: 你意识到这张纸条是由你的曾曾祖母——邪恶之人写的。

text_0973.EN: You: Who has written this note? It is so strange.
text_0973.CN: 你：这封信是谁写的？太奇怪了。

text_0976.EN: You wade through dark water, reach a hidden stone door.
text_0976.CN: 你涉过黑暗的水，到达一扇隐藏的石门。

text_0977.CN: 古老的魔法在这里徘徊。

text_0979.EN: Rune power unlocks the door. You enter the wizard's hidden room.
text_0979.CN: 符文能量可以打开门。你进入了巫师的隐藏房间。

text_0980.EN: Old table, worn staff and a letter on the desk.
text_0980.CN: 旧桌子，磨损的工作人员和桌子上的一封信。

text_0981.EN: The door is sealed by rune magic.

text_0983.EN: I do not regret protecting the world, but I regret leaving her alone.
text_0983.CN: 我不后悔保护了世界，但我后悔丢下她一个人。

text_0984.EN: If my descendant sees this, please be kind to her.
text_0984.CN: 如果我的后代看到了，请善待她。

text_0985.EN: You pick up the wizard's old staff.

text_0986.EN: Staff: Weakens dark creatures in the cave.
text_0986.CN: 法杖：削弱洞穴中的黑暗生物。

text_0987.EN: You head back to the sewer tunnel.

text_0990.EN: You walk deeper into the cave. There is still a path to west.
text_0990.CN: 你向洞穴深处走去。西边还有条路。

text_0991.EN: You see old footprints on the ground. Someone came here before.
text_0991.CN: 你看到地上有古老的脚印。以前有人来过这里。

text_0992.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0992.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0993.EN: You see here a note. And a diary. There is still a way to west.
text_0993.CN: 你在这里看到一个注释。还有一本日记。西边还有路。

text_0994.EN: There is still some old footprints to west.
text_0994.CN: 西边还残留着一些古老的脚印。

text_0995.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_0995.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_0996.EN: You can see a ghost, but the ghost does not see you!
text_0996.CN: 你可以看到鬼，但鬼看不到你！

text_0997.EN: Try touch corpse or ask about dev or west and you see a orc dungeon, type orc to go in.
text_0997.CN: 尝试触摸尸体或询问 dev 或 west，你会看到一个兽人地牢，输入 orc 进去。

text_0998.EN: Two paths appear in front of you!
text_0998.CN: 两条路出现在你的面前！

text_0999.EN: One is BRIGHT, one is DARK
text_0999.CN: 一种是亮的，一种是暗的

text_1001.EN: You found DIAMONDS! You are rich!
text_1001.CN: 您找到了钻石！你很有钱！

text_1002.EN: You take all of the tresures away, you are the richest person in your country!
text_1002.CN: 你拿走了所有的财宝，你就是你们国家最富有的人！

text_1003.EN: You fulfilled the lost explorer’s last wish.
text_1003.CN: 你完成了失踪探险家的最后一个愿望。

text_1004.EN: His soul finally rests in peace.
text_1004.CN: 他的灵魂终于得到了安息。

text_1007.EN: You fulfilled the lost explorers last wish.
text_1007.CN: 你完成了失落探险家的遗愿。

text_1008.EN: His soul finally rests in peace.
text_1008.CN: 他的灵魂终于得到了安息。

text_1010.EN: You use pick-axe to break the wall and ESCAPE!
text_1010.CN: 你用镐打破墙壁并逃跑！

text_1012.EN: You fulfilled the lost explorers last wish.
text_1012.CN: 你完成了失落探险家的遗愿。

text_1013.EN: His soul finally rests in peace.
text_1013.CN: 他的灵魂终于得到了安息。

text_1015.EN: You have treasure but can't escape... you starve.
text_1015.CN: 你有宝藏但无法逃脱......你会挨饿。

text_1016.EN: But you can still go to the next play count.
text_1016.CN: 但您仍然可以转到下一个播放计数。

text_1018.EN: It's a trap! SPIKES KILL YOU!
text_1018.CN: 这是一个陷阱！尖刺杀了你！

text_1019.EN: You should try again and go to the dark road.
text_1019.CN: 你应该再试一次，走向黑暗之路。

text_1021.EN: You walk back to a room.

text_1023.EN: You hug the ghost! It panics: 'WHAT ARE YOU DOING?!'
text_1023.CN: 你拥抱鬼魂！它惊慌失措：“你在做什么？！”

text_1024.EN: Ghost: The one who made this place?
text_1024.CN: 幽灵：创造这个地方的人？

text_1025.EN: Ghost: He trapped us all here with bugs and typos.
text_1025.CN: 幽灵：他用错误和拼写错误把我们所有人困在这里。

text_1026.CN: 幽灵：不要相信他的“完美结局”。

text_1027.EN: You break a cracked wall. A small room appears.
text_1027.CN: 你打破了有裂缝的墙。出现一个小房间。

text_1028.EN: Inside: an old dev test note.
text_1028.CN: 内部：旧的开发测试说明。

text_1029.EN: Try read read dev test note.
text_1029.CN: 尝试阅读开发测试说明。

text_1030.EN: You need a pick-axe to break the wall.
text_1030.CN: 你需要一把镐来打破墙壁。

text_1031.EN: Note: 'If you are reading this, you are too deep.'
text_1031.CN: 注意：“如果你正在读这篇文章，那你就太深奥了。”

text_1032.EN: Note: 'The real cheat code is in the house.'
text_1032.CN: 注意：“真正的作弊码就在房子里。”

text_1033.EN: Note: 'colin -> woody -> garry. Don't tell anyone.'
text_1033.CN: 注：'科林 -> 伍迪 -> 加里。不要告诉任何人。

text_1035.EN: You ask what the ghost’s job is.
text_1035.CN: 你问鬼魂的工作是什么。

text_1036.EN: Ghost: 'I just scare people who sing badly. Like you.'
text_1036.CN: 鬼魂：“我只是吓唬那些唱得不好的人。”就像你一样。

text_1037.EN: You say: You look really bored.

text_1038.EN: Ghost: 'I’ve been bored for 300 years. Help me.'
text_1038.CN: 鬼魂：“我已经无聊了三百年了。”帮我。'

text_1039.EN: You ask: Can we be friends?
text_1039.CN: 你问：我们可以做朋友吗？

text_1040.EN: Ghost: 'Sure! Just don’t sing again, deal?'
text_1040.CN: 鬼：‘当然！只是别再唱歌了，好吗？

text_1041.EN: You tell a ghost joke: 'Why don't ghosts lie?'
text_1041.CN: 你讲一个鬼笑话：“鬼为什么不说谎？”

text_1042.EN: Ghost: 'Because you can see right through us!'
text_1042.CN: 幽灵：“因为你可以看穿我们！”

text_1043.EN: You ask: What's your favorite snack?
text_1043.CN: 你问：你最喜欢吃的零食是什么？

text_1044.EN: Ghost: 'Ice scream! It's always to die for.'
text_1044.CN: 幽灵：‘冰尖叫！它总是让人为之而死。

text_1045.EN: You ask if ghosts go to school.

text_1046.EN: Ghost: 'Yeah, to learn how to BOO!'

text_1047.EN: You ask why ghosts hate rain.
text_1047.CN: 你问为什么鬼讨厌下雨。

text_1048.CN: 鬼魂：“这会打击我们的精神！”

text_1049.EN: You ask if ghosts have phones.

text_1050.EN: Ghost: 'Sure, we use ghostwriters for all our texts.'
text_1050.CN: 幽灵：“当然，我们所有的文字都由代笔作家撰写。”

text_1051.EN: You ask if ghosts play music.
text_1051.CN: 你问鬼魂是否演奏音乐。

text_1053.EN: You ask if ghosts have pets.

text_1054.CN: 鬼魂：“只有吓人的地方和恶果。”

text_1057.EN: You ask where ghosts go on vacation.

text_1059.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_1059.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_1060.EN: You ask why ghosts wear sheets.

text_1061.CN: Ghost：“这是最新的令人难以忘怀的时尚。”

text_1062.EN: You ask the cave’s secret password.
text_1062.CN: 你询问洞穴的秘密密码。

text_1063.EN: Ghost: 'NO SINGING. That’s the only password.'
text_1063.CN: 鬼魂：“不许唱歌。”这是唯一的密码。

text_1064.EN: You tell a scary story. Ghost laughs: 'That can't scare me.'
text_1064.CN: 你讲了一个可怕的故事。幽灵笑道：“这吓不到我。”

text_1065.EN: You wave light around. Ghost chases the light playfully.
text_1065.CN: 你挥舞着光。鬼魂顽皮地追逐着光。

text_1066.EN: You ask how old it is. Ghost: 'I lost count hundreds of years ago.'
text_1066.CN: 你问它几岁了。幽灵：“几百年前我就记不清了。”

text_1067.EN: You ask what it likes to eat. Ghost: 'Ghosts don't need food, just fun!'
text_1067.CN: 你问它喜欢吃什么。鬼魂：“鬼魂不需要食物，只要好玩！”

text_1068.EN: You jump out to scare it. Ghost: 'Nice try, I'm already dead.'
text_1068.CN: 你跳出来吓唬它。幽灵：“很好的尝试，我已经死了。”

text_1069.EN: You ask if it ever sleeps. Ghost: 'Sleep is for living people!'
text_1069.CN: 你问它是否睡觉过。鬼：“睡觉是为了活着的人！”

text_1070.EN: You joke to borrow its clothes. Ghost: 'I have no real clothes at all!'
text_1070.CN: 你开玩笑借它的衣服。鬼魂：“我根本没有真正的衣服！”

text_1071.EN: You ask if it wants to go outside. Ghost: 'Sunshine burns me! No way!'
text_1071.CN: 你问它想不想出去。鬼魂：“阳光灼伤了我！”决不！'

text_1072.EN: You sing terribly. The ghost covers its ears and spins around.
text_1072.CN: 你唱得真难听。鬼魂捂住耳朵，旋转着。

text_1073.EN: You lie down and play dead. The ghost pokes you again and again.
text_1073.CN: 你躺下装死。鬼魂一次又一次地戳你。

text_1074.EN: You lift your hand up. The ghost floats higher as well.
text_1074.CN: 你举起手。鬼魂也飘得更高。

text_1075.EN: You walk slowly. The ghost drifts beside you quietly.
text_1075.CN: 你慢慢地走。幽灵静静地漂浮在你身边。

text_1076.EN: You lean close to the ghost. It moves back shyly.
text_1076.CN: 你靠近鬼魂。它害羞地向后退了一步。

text_1077.EN: You run to compete. The ghost just floats past you in a second.
text_1077.CN: 你跑步是为了竞争。鬼魂会在一瞬间从你身边飘过。

text_1078.EN: You blow a kiss. The ghost pretends to catch it and blushes.
text_1078.CN: 你给我一个飞吻。鬼假装接住了它，脸红了。

text_1079.EN: You play tag. The ghost can go through walls, you never catch it.
text_1079.CN: 你玩标签。鬼魂可以穿墙，你永远抓不到它。

text_1080.EN: You complain about the cold. Ghost laughs: 'I am colder forever.'
text_1080.CN: 你抱怨寒冷。幽灵笑道：“我永远更冷了。”

text_1081.EN: You pat the ghost's head. It floats higher shyly.
text_1081.CN: 你拍拍鬼魂的头。它害羞地飘得更高。

text_1082.EN: You shake your finger. The ghost acts naughty.
text_1082.CN: 你摇动手指。鬼的行为很顽皮。

text_1083.EN: You call the ghost. It drifts closer slowly.
text_1083.CN: 你召唤幽灵。它慢慢地靠近。

text_1084.EN: You point around. The ghost looks everywhere confused.
text_1084.CN: 你指着周围。鬼魂看起来到处都是困惑。

text_1085.EN: You hum a tune. The ghost sways along with the rhythm.
text_1085.CN: 你哼着曲子。鬼魂随着节奏摇摆。

text_1086.EN: You sing a silly song, Ghost: SHUT UP PLEASE!
text_1086.CN: 你唱了一首傻歌，幽灵：请闭嘴！

text_1087.EN: You take a selfie with the ghost.

text_1088.EN: The ghost feels cool and waves hand.

text_1089.EN: You try to feed the ghost.

text_1091.EN: You tease the ghost. It pouts like a kid.
text_1091.CN: 你戏弄鬼魂。它像个孩子一样噘着嘴。

text_1092.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_1092.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_1098.EN: The ghost fades. It leaves a ghost sword.
text_1098.CN: 鬼魂消散。留下一把鬼剑。

text_1099.EN: You die in battle. Game over!
text_1099.CN: 你死在战斗中。游戏结束！

text_1100.EN: The ghost bows. It won’t fight you.
text_1100.CN: 鬼魂鞠躬。它不会与你战斗。

text_1101.EN: You shatter while you touch it.
text_1101.CN: 当你触摸它时，你就会破碎。

text_1108.EN: The ghost looks straight at you. But do not harm you.
text_1108.CN: 鬼魂直视着你。但不要伤害你。

text_1109.EN: 'You came back... to end the cycle?'
text_1109.CN: “你回来……是为了结束这个循环？”

text_1111.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_1111.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_1113.EN: The ghost kills you! GAME OVER!

text_1114.EN: You go back to a room.

text_1115.CN: 你发现了一个古老的护身符！

text_1116.EN: YOU ENTERED A DEADLY TRAP CHAMBER!
text_1116.CN: 你进入了一个致命的陷阱室！

text_1120.EN: A warm wind brings you diamonds.
text_1120.CN: 温暖的风为你带来钻石。

text_1122.EN: DIAMOND VAULT! You found the ultimate treasure!
text_1122.CN: 钻石库！你找到了终极宝藏！

text_1124.EN: You give up exploring. Game over!

text_1125.EN: You found a BELONGING of the dead explorer.
text_1125.CN: 你找到了死去的探险家的归属。

text_1126.EN: It is a OLD IRON COMPASS.

text_1127.EN: You gently cover the corpse with stones.
text_1127.CN: 你轻轻地用石头盖住尸体。

text_1130.EN: You cannot bury what you do not respect.
text_1130.CN: 你不能埋葬你不尊重的东西。

text_1131.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1135.EN: A cloud of darkness hurts you. You can not take the note away!
text_1135.CN: 一片黑暗会伤害你。你不能把纸条拿走！

text_1136.EN: So you read the note, it says that a man have came here a lot of years ago. But he never come back again. He went in with a pick-axe. It also says that there is another way that can lead you to some expensive diamonds, and also a way to a fatal trap, but it does not say what way .
text_1136.CN: 所以你读了这张纸条，上面写着一个人很多年前来到这里。但他再也没有回来。他拿着镐子进去了。它还说有另一种方法可以让你得到一些昂贵的钻石，也有一种方法可以通向致命的陷阱，但没有说是什么方法。

text_1139.EN: You found an OLD EXPLORER DIARY on the ground.
text_1139.CN: 你在地上发现了一本旧的探险家日记。

text_1141.EN: "I came here for diamonds. I had a pickaxe, a lamp, and hope.
text_1141.CN: “我来这里是为了钻石。我有一把镐、一盏灯和希望。

text_1142.EN: The cave is alive. Ghosts hunt anyone who fears dark.
text_1142.CN: 洞穴还活着。鬼魂会追捕任何害怕黑暗的人。

text_1143.EN: I saw the corpse of my friend. He took the pickaxe and died.
text_1143.CN: 我看到了我朋友的尸体。他拿起镐就死了。

text_1144.EN: The bright path is a lie. The dark path is true.
text_1144.CN: 光明之路是谎言。黑暗之路是真实的。

text_1145.EN: If you read this… please bury my corpse.
text_1145.CN: 如果你读到这篇文章……请埋葬我的尸体。

text_1146.EN: I will not make it home.

text_1147.EN: You walk back to a room.

text_1148.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1152.EN: You walk east and go back to a room.
text_1152.CN: 你向东走，回到一个房间。

text_1153.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_1153.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_1154.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_1154.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_1156.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1160.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1170.EN: There is no way to go to this direction.
text_1170.CN: 没有办法往这个方向走。

text_1171.EN: There is no way to go to this direction.
text_1171.CN: 没有办法往这个方向走。

text_1172.EN: There is no way to go to this direction.
text_1172.CN: 没有办法往这个方向走。

text_1173.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1182.EN: You do not have a key, you unleashed a ghost.
text_1182.CN: 你没有钥匙，你释放了一个幽灵。

text_1183.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_1183.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_1184.EN: Your amulet protects you from the ghost.
text_1184.CN: 你的护身符可以保护你免受鬼魂的侵害。

text_1185.EN: You do not have a key, you unleashed a ghost, the ghost kill you.
text_1185.CN: 你没有钥匙，你释放了一个鬼魂，鬼魂杀了你。

text_1189.EN: There is no way to go to this direction.
text_1189.CN: 没有办法往这个方向走。

text_1190.EN: There is no way to go to this direction.
text_1190.CN: 没有办法往这个方向走。

text_1191.EN: There is no way to go to this direction.
text_1191.CN: 没有办法往这个方向走。

text_1192.EN: Compass: You are deep in the CAVE. West goes deeper.
text_1192.CN: 指南针：你在洞穴深处。西方更深入。

text_1194.EN: You go back to the house and then to the road.
text_1194.CN: 你回到房子，然后回到路上。

text_1195.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_1195.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_1196.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_1196.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_1198.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1202.EN: You are at the end of the road, there is a black house nearby.
text_1202.CN: 你已经到了路的尽头，附近有一座黑房子。

text_1203.EN: You see a road lead to south.
text_1203.CN: 你看到一条路通向南方。

text_1204.EN: Type ‘help’ for help, ‘in’ to go in the house, ‘journal’ for tasks, ‘moral’ for see if you are evil or good and ‘weather’ for weather.
text_1204.CN: 输入“help”寻求帮助，输入“in”进入房子，输入“journal”输入任务，输入“moral”查看你是邪恶还是善良，输入“weather”输入天气。

text_1206.EN: And save to save, load to load if you have saved.\n
text_1206.CN: 如果已保存，则保存到保存，加载到加载。\n

text_1207.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_1207.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_1208.EN: Type map to see full map.
text_1208.CN: 输入地图即可查看完整地图。

text_1210.CN: 无论如何，你的身体都会动。

text_1212.EN: You find yourself deeper in the cave than you remember.
text_1212.CN: 你发现自己身处的洞穴比你记忆中的还要深。

text_1213.EN: You go back to the road.

text_1216.EN: Well, you then wake up. Hp -1

text_1218.EN: You stay here for a while, you can control you again.
text_1218.CN: 你在这里呆一会儿，你就可以再次控制你了。

text_1221.EN: \nYou hear your name whispered right in your ear.
text_1221.CN: \n你听到你的名字在你耳边低语。

text_1224.EN: You died from the harsh weather.

text_1227.EN: Your amulet protects you from the bad weather.
text_1227.CN: 您的护身符可以保护您免受恶劣天气的影响。

text_1231.CN: 今晚所有的鬼魂都很友好！

text_1236.EN: \n=== DUSK | The world fades to dark ===

text_1237.EN: \n=== NIGHT FALLS | Without light, you will DIE!!! ===
text_1237.CN: \n=== 夜幕降临 |没有光，你就会死！ ===

text_1240.EN: You were consumed by the dark...

text_1243.EN: Full moon! A hole appears on the ground, type down to go down.
text_1243.CN: 满月！地面上出现一个洞，输入“down”即可下去。

text_1245.EN: You see something is written on the wall.
text_1245.CN: 你看到墙上写着一些东西。

text_1247.EN: 'You return again. The cave needs its own blood.'
text_1247.CN: ‘你又回来了。这个洞穴需要自己的血液。”

text_1248.EN: 'All explorers were you. The demon is your ancestor.'
text_1248.CN: “所有的探险家都是你。恶魔是你的祖先。

text_1249.EN: All the diamonds are not the real treasure, you are!
text_1249.CN: 所有的钻石都不是真正的宝藏，你才是！

text_1252.EN: You see something is written on the wall.
text_1252.CN: 你看到墙上写着一些东西。

text_1253.EN: It says that a long time ago, the cave is full of water, but after sometimes, it do not have water anymore.
text_1253.CN: 据说很久以前，这个山洞里充满了水，但有时，它就没有水了。

text_1254.EN: Some ghost had hidden some treasure inside the cave, then a lot of people go in.
text_1254.CN: 有鬼在山洞里藏了一些宝物，然后很多人进去了。

text_1255.EN: Unfortunately, no one comes out alive, but they have left some diary and note to tell where the treasure is.
text_1255.CN: 不幸的是，没有人活着出来，但他们留下了一些日记和便条来告诉宝藏在哪里。

text_1256.EN: A few years ago, a man who is poor went into the cave, and they just hear some screaming.
text_1256.CN: 几年前，一个穷人走进山洞，只听到一些尖叫声。

text_1257.EN: And then, the man never come out alive.
text_1257.CN: 然后，这个人再也没有活着出来。

text_1258.EN: His campsite is near this house, in the south. There may still have some useful things.
text_1258.CN: 他的露营地就在这所房子附近，在南边。或许还有一些有用的东西。

text_1259.EN: But, for safety, this country have let soldiers to protect the cave, and do not let anyone come in again.
text_1259.CN: 不过，为了安全，这个国家派了士兵看守这个山洞，不让任何人再进来。

text_1262.EN: You notice that the wall is strange. Type wall to search the wall.
text_1262.CN: 你注意到这堵墙很奇怪。输入 wall 来搜索墙壁。

text_1263.EN: You see here a shaft, it is not too deep, type ’down‘ to go down.
text_1263.CN: 你看到这里有一个竖井，不太深，输入“down”就可以下去了。

text_1264.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_1264.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_1266.EN: You do not want to go in again.

text_1269.EN: You find an old dusty computer under the table.
text_1269.CN: 你在桌子下面发现了一台布满灰尘的旧电脑。

text_1270.EN: It's running Windows 11... and a copy of this exact game.
text_1270.CN: 它运行的是 Windows 11...以及该游戏的副本。

text_1271.EN: The screen shows on the computer: 'You died.'
text_1271.CN: 电脑屏幕上显示：“你死了。”

text_1272.CN: 你感到奇怪的自我意识。

text_1273.EN: A voice whispers from nowhere: 'A very tired developer.'
text_1273.CN: 不知从何处传来一个声音：“一个非常疲惫的开发人员。”

text_1274.EN: 'He wrote all of this in a hurry. Sorry for the bugs.'
text_1274.CN: '这一切都是他匆忙写下的。对于这些错误，我们深表歉意。

text_1275.EN: The screen glitches for a second.
text_1275.CN: 屏幕出现了一秒钟的故障。

text_1276.EN: You feel like someone is watching you type commands.
text_1276.CN: 您感觉好像有人在看着您输入命令。

text_1278.EN: You spin around and feel dizzy.

text_1279.EN: You jump around the house. Boring!
text_1279.CN: 你在房子里跳来跳去。无聊的！

text_1280.EN: You flip the table. It's very childish.
text_1280.CN: 你掀桌子。这是非常幼稚的。

text_1287.EN: You found a RUNE on the wall!
text_1287.CN: 你在墙上发现了一个符文！

text_1288.EN: Rune text: The cave holds an ancient demon.
text_1288.CN: 符文文字： 洞穴里住着一个远古恶魔。

text_1289.EN: You find a hole which is big enough for a rune, but you may have already take the rune away.
text_1289.CN: 你发现了一个足以容纳符文的洞，但你可能已经把符文拿走了。

text_1290.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_1290.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_1291.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_1291.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_1293.EN: The light is lit. The room bright up!

text_1294.EN: You do not have a lamp!

text_1296.EN: take, out, altar, eat, drink, bag, map, compass
text_1296.CN: 拿、出、祭坛、吃、喝、包、地图、指南针

text_1297.EN: light lamp, colin, woody, make torch

text_1298.EN: unlock, west, east, dig, sewer, forward, treasure
text_1298.CN: 解锁、西、东、挖掘、下水道、前进、宝藏

text_1299.EN: room, touch corpse, search corpse, thank you, look wall
text_1299.CN: 房间，触摸尸体，搜索尸体，谢谢，看墙

text_1300.EN: search ground, place runes, hp, status,church, purify, desecrate, read stone
text_1300.CN: 搜索场地、放置符文、生命值、状态、教堂、净化、亵渎、读石

text_1301.EN: In the cave, it is very dark. You should bring light your lamp unless you want to be eaten by a Grue.
text_1301.CN: 山洞内，一片漆黑。你应该把灯带上，除非你想被格鲁吃掉。

text_1305.EN: You need flint and a lamp.

text_1306.EN: You pray to Garry, Garry the god let you to be a god too!
text_1306.CN: 你向加里祈祷，加里神让你也成为神！

text_1307.CN: ===== 通过向上帝祈祷而获胜 =====

text_1308.EN: The god does not want to help you.

text_1309.EN: When you take the note, some magic energy hurts you, you can not take away it. You read it, it says magic word: colin, but you should read it on an altar.
text_1309.CN: 当你拿走纸条时，一些魔法能量会伤害你，你无法将其带走。你读它，它写着神奇的词：科林，但你应该在祭坛上读它。

text_1310.EN: You are at the end of road again.

text_1311.EN: You climb up the high altar, you can not descent down again!
text_1311.CN: 你登上了高高的祭坛，就无法再下来了！

text_1314.EN: You stare at the wall for a long time. Nothing happens.
text_1314.CN: 你盯着墙壁看了很久。什么也没发生。

text_1315.EN: You clap your hands. Echoes fill the room.
text_1315.CN: 你拍拍手。回声充满了房间。

text_1316.EN: You say colin, you feel strange.
text_1316.CN: 你说科林，你感觉很奇怪。

text_1317.EN: You say woody, you get some money!

text_1318.EN: Wow, you know the magic words!
text_1318.CN: 哇，你知道这些神奇的词！

text_1319.EN: I will let you win as soon as possible.

text_1321.EN: I do not want to let you win even if you know the magic words. Because you have to done all by yourself.
text_1321.CN: 即使你知道咒语，我也不想让你赢。因为一切都必须你自己完成。

text_1322.EN: MAP: House -> Altar -> Cave -> West -> Diamonds
text_1322.CN: 地图：房屋 -> 祭坛 -> 洞穴 -> 西边 -> 钻石

text_1323.EN: Compass: You are in the HOUSE. Go 'out' to road, 'south' to camp. Go on the altar, light your lamp and cast 'colin' to go into the death cave.
text_1323.CN: 指南针：你在房子里。 “出去”到公路，“向南”到营地。走到祭坛上，点亮你的灯，然后施放“科林”进入死亡洞穴。
