text_1324.EN: Compass: You are on the ROAD. 'in' for house, 'south' for camp.
text_1324.CN: 指南针：您正在路上。 “in”代表房屋，“south”代表营地。

text_1326.EN: You do not have a compass.

text_1327.EN: You found a hidden note from your father, beneath the floor.
text_1327.CN: 你在地板下面发现了一张你父亲的隐藏字条。

text_1330.EN: If you are reading this, I am already dead.
text_1330.CN: 如果你正在读这篇文章，我已经死了。

text_1331.EN: I never went on holiday. I came to the cave to finish our family’s duty.
text_1331.CN: 我从来没有去度假过。我来到山洞是为了完成我们一家人的职责。

text_1332.EN: Our bloodline carries the wizard’s power and the demon’s soul.
text_1332.CN: 我们的血脉承载着巫师的力量和恶魔的灵魂。

text_1333.EN: I tried to break the curse. I failed.
text_1333.CN: 我试图打破诅咒。我失败了。

text_1334.EN: The cave does not want treasure. It wants the heir.
text_1334.CN: 山洞里不要宝藏。它想要继承人。

text_1335.EN: You are the only one who can finally end it.
text_1335.CN: 你是唯一能最终结束这一切的人。

text_1336.EN: I am sorry I left you.

text_1339.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1340.EN: You hear a demon talk to you!
text_1340.CN: 你听到恶魔在跟你说话！

text_1341.EN: This time, you understand every word clearly.
text_1341.CN: 这一次，你每一个字都听清楚了。

text_1343.EN: 'Seal me, free me, or join me.'

text_1344.EN: You hear a demon talk to you! But you do not know what she says.
text_1344.CN: 你听到恶魔在跟你说话！但你不知道她说什么。

text_1345.EN: You can place the runes now, type place runes to place them.
text_1345.CN: 您现在可以放置符文，输入 place runes 来放置它们。

text_1346.EN: The light is lit. The room bright up!

text_1347.EN: You do not have a lamp!

text_1349.EN: Rune says: But, if you control the demon, you must be here for all of your life.
text_1349.CN: 符文说：但是，如果你控制了恶魔，你就必须终生留在这里。

text_1350.EN: You have already taken the rune.

text_1351.EN: You can not get this rune, because some mysterious power force pretents you from taking.
text_1351.CN: 你无法获得这个符文，因为某种神秘的力量阻止你获得。

text_1352.EN: Only enable in ng2, and try to go in the death cave!\n
text_1352.CN: 仅在ng2中启用，并尝试进入死亡洞穴！\n

text_1354.EN: It is very dark here. You feel like you are be eaten by a Grue.
text_1354.CN: 这里很黑。你感觉自己被格鲁吃掉了。

text_1356.CN: 你的手电筒让格鲁远离你。

text_1358.EN: You are in a cave, there is a grate. The grate is locked. You must open the grate to go further.
text_1358.CN: 你在一个山洞里，那里有一个格栅。格栅已锁。你必须打开栅栏才能走得更远。

text_1362.EN: You are in a cave, there is a grate. The grate is locked. You must open the grate to go further.
text_1362.CN: 你在一个山洞里，那里有一个格栅。格栅已锁。你必须打开栅栏才能走得更远。

text_1365.EN: You go down safetly with your rope.

text_1366.EN: You jump down the high altar and break all of your bones!
text_1366.CN: 你从高高的祭坛上跳下来，摔断了所有的骨头！

text_1368.EN: All runes glow! The ancient seal trembles!
text_1368.CN: 所有符文都会发光！古印颤抖！

text_1369.EN: Choose: seal (good > 10) / release / absorb / sacrifice / symbiosis (good > 5) / leave
text_1369.CN: 选择：封印（好> 10）/释放/吸收/牺牲/共生（好> 5）/离开

text_1370.EN: Choose: seal (good > 10) / release / absorb / sacrifice / symbiosis / unleash (good > 20) / leave / break curse (good > 25) / truth
text_1370.CN: 选择：封印（好> 10）/释放/吸收/牺牲/共生/释放（好> 20）/离开/打破诅咒（好> 25）/真相

text_1371.EN: You sealed the cave Evil FOREVER.
text_1371.CN: 你永远封印了邪恶的洞穴。

text_1372.EN: And then, you stay here until you dead.
text_1372.CN: 然后，你就留在这里，直到死去。

text_1373.EN: You realised that all explorers were guardians, not treasure hunters.
text_1373.CN: 你意识到所有的探险家都是守护者，而不是寻宝者。

text_1374.EN: They gave up wealth to protect the world.
text_1374.CN: 他们放弃财富来保护世界。

text_1379.EN: You unleash your great-great grandmother, the wizard -- your great-great grandfather appears.
text_1379.CN: 你释放了你的曾曾祖母，巫师——你的曾曾祖父出现了。

text_1383.EN: You do not know how to unleash, because the curse.
text_1383.CN: 你不知道如何释放，因为诅咒。

text_1384.EN: You leave the cave safetly, and you never come back again.
text_1384.CN: 你安全地离开了山洞，再也不会回来了。

text_1386.EN: You want to leave, but the Evil kills you.
text_1386.CN: 你想离开，但邪恶杀死了你。

text_1388.CN: 邪恶觉醒了！它摧毁了一切！

text_1391.EN: The Evil is shocked, then she smiles and hug you!
text_1391.CN: 邪恶震惊了，然后她微笑着拥抱你！

text_1393.EN: The Evil do not want to talk to you.

text_1395.EN: You become the immortal ruler of the cave!
text_1395.CN: 你将成为洞府不朽的统治者！

text_1397.EN: You sacrifice your life force to calm the Evil.
text_1397.CN: 你牺牲自己的生命力来平息邪恶。

text_1398.EN: You turn to stone, guarding the cave forever.
text_1398.CN: 你变成了石头，永远守护着这个洞穴。

text_1400.EN: You make a pact with the Evil.

text_1401.EN: You gain power but can never leave the cave.
text_1401.CN: 你获得了力量，但永远无法离开洞穴。

text_1404.EN: You place all runes and speak the ancient words.
text_1404.CN: 你放置所有的符文并说出古老的话语。

text_1405.EN: The curse is broken. The cave is finally free.
text_1405.CN: 诅咒被打破了。山洞终于自由了。

text_1406.EN: You have escaped the cycle of death.
text_1406.CN: 你已经脱离了死亡循环。

text_1408.EN: You do not have a magic key, so you can not end the curse.
text_1408.CN: 你没有魔法钥匙，所以你无法结束诅咒。

text_1410.EN: You do not know the truth.

text_1411.EN: You use the magic key to break the curse.
text_1411.CN: 你使用魔法钥匙来打破诅咒。

text_1412.EN: Your great-great grandfather and his wife, and your great grandfather and his wife, and your grandfather and his wife, and you father and you mum, all appears.
text_1412.CN: 你的曾祖父和他的妻子，你的曾祖父和他的妻子，你的祖父和他的妻子，你的父亲和你的妈妈，都出现了。

text_1416.EN: You do not have a magic key.(Or you can not do it now.)
text_1416.CN: 你没有魔法钥匙。（或者你现在不能这样做。）

text_1421.CN: 一股神秘的力量围绕着你！

text_1423.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1425.EN: north / south / east / west - Move between areas
text_1425.CN: 北/南/东/西 - 在区域之间移动

text_1429.EN: save / load - Save or load progress
text_1429.CN: 保存/加载 - 保存或加载进度

text_1430.EN: read diary / take diary - Check story notes
text_1430.CN: 读日记/记日记 - 检查故事笔记

text_1431.EN: sing / dance / joke - Fun interactive commands
text_1431.CN: 唱歌/跳舞/笑话 - 有趣的互动命令

text_1432.EN: leave / back - Return to previous area
text_1432.CN: 离开/返回 - 返回上一个区域

text_1435.EN: You do not want to go in again.

text_1436.EN: I do not see any hole.

text_1437.EN: Do not cheat! You are alredy have many things! For example, three runes in your memory.
text_1437.CN: 不要作弊！你已经拥有很多东西了！比如你记忆中的三个符文。

text_1439.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_1439.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_1440.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_1440.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_1442.EN: You are kind. NPCs treat you friendly.
text_1442.CN: 你很善良。 NPC 对你很友好。

text_1443.EN: You are ruthless. NPCs stay alert.
text_1443.CN: 你很无情。 NPC 保持警惕。

input_1446.EN: Go to merchant or watchtower or military_fort? (merchant / tower / fort):
input_1446.CN: 去商人、瞭望塔还是军事堡垒？ （商人/塔/堡垒）：

text_1447.CN: 您找到了一位旅行商人！

text_1449.EN: Type ask ask past or talk more to ask.
text_1449.CN: 输入“ask”询问过去或“多说”询问。

text_1450.EN: Merchant: Welcome, god, what are you going to do here?
text_1450.CN: 商人：欢迎光临，上帝，你来这里要做什么？

text_1452.CN: 交易成功！获得超级护身符！

text_1453.CN: 交易成功！获得永恒火炬！

text_1454.EN: You stare at the merchant. He feels awkward.
text_1454.CN: 你盯着商人。他感觉很尴尬。

text_1455.EN: Merchant: Really? Attack a definess poor merchant? You are so evil!
text_1455.CN: 商人：真的吗？攻击一个可怜的商人？你太邪恶了！

text_1456.EN: You wave. The merchant waves back lazily.
text_1456.CN: 你挥手。商人懒洋洋地向我挥手。

text_1457.EN: You nod again and again. The merchant nods along too.
text_1457.CN: 你连连点头。商人也跟着点头。

text_1458.EN: You copy every move the merchant makes. He gets confused and freezes.
text_1458.CN: 您复制商人的一举一动。他感到困惑并僵住了。

text_1459.EN: You pretend to cry. The merchant panics and does not know what to do.
text_1459.CN: 你假装哭泣。商人惊慌失措，不知道该怎么办。

text_1460.EN: You dance together. Both of you look extremely clumsy.
text_1460.CN: 你们一起跳舞。你们俩看上去都极其笨拙。

text_1461.EN: You pretend to doze. The merchant stays quiet.
text_1461.CN: 你假装打瞌睡。商人保持沉默。

text_1462.EN: You walk circles around him. He just stands still.
text_1462.CN: 你绕着他转一圈。他只是站着不动。

text_1463.EN: You complain about the cave. Merchant agrees with you.
text_1463.CN: 你抱怨这个洞穴。商家同意你的观点。

text_1464.EN: You say: You look so lazy.

text_1465.EN: Merchant: 'Business is slow when everyone gets haunted.'
text_1465.CN: 商人：“当每个人都闹鬼时，生意就会很慢。”

text_1466.EN: You ask: Are you scared of ghosts?

text_1469.EN: Merchant: 'I work next to a death cave. Of course I’m tired!'
text_1469.CN: 商人：“我在死亡洞穴旁边工作。我当然累了！

text_1470.EN: You challenge arm wrestling. You lose in one second.
text_1470.CN: 你挑战扳手腕。一秒钟你就输了。

text_1472.EN: Merchant: I was once just like you, chasing gold in this cave.
text_1472.CN: 商人：我也曾和你一样，在这个山洞里追金子。

text_1473.EN: I learned all the secrets, but chose to walk away from the cycle.
text_1473.CN: 我了解了所有的秘密，但选择离开这个循环。

text_1474.EN: I trade goods here, watching every new heir step onto this road.
text_1474.CN: 我在这里交易货物，看着每一个新的继承人踏上这条路。

text_1475.EN: Merchant: I used to be an adventurer too, same as you.
text_1475.CN: 商人：我也曾经和你一样是冒险家。

text_1476.EN: Merchant: I came here with my best friend, chasing the diamond legend.\n
text_1476.CN: 商人：我和我最好的朋友来到这里，追逐钻石传奇。\n

text_1477.EN: You can still type ask more if you want to know more.\n
text_1477.CN: 如果您想了解更多信息，您仍然可以输入“询问更多”。\n

text_1478.EN: Merchant: He was the last guardian of this cave. Your grandfather's generation.
text_1478.CN: 商人：他是这个洞穴的最后一个守护者。你祖父那一代。

text_1479.EN: Merchant: He chose to stay inside, and I chose to wait outside.\n
text_1479.CN: 商人：他选择留在里面，我选择在外面等。\n

text_1480.EN: Merchant: I've seen hundreds of people walk in. Most never come out.
text_1480.CN: 商人：我见过数百人走进去，但大多数人都没有出来。

text_1481.EN: Merchant: You're the first one with his eyes. The bloodline shows.\n
text_1481.CN: 商人：你是第一个看到他眼睛的人。血统显露出来。\n

text_1482.EN: Merchant: End the cycle. Don't repeat his mistake.
text_1482.CN: 商人：结束循环。不要再犯他的错误。

text_1483.EN: Merchant: Take this. He left it for the heir.\n
text_1483.CN: 商人：拿着这个。他把它留给了继承人。\n

text_1485.EN: Merchant nods quietly, watching the cave entrance.\n
text_1485.CN: 商人静静地点点头，看着洞穴入口。\n

text_1486.EN: Merchant: Your blood ties you to this place. No one escapes easily.
text_1486.CN: 商人：你的血脉将你与这个地方联系在一起。没有人能轻易逃脱。

text_1487.EN: But choices are always yours. That is the only freedom we have.
text_1487.CN: 但选择永远是你的。这是我们唯一拥有的自由。

text_1488.EN: You traded gold for ANCIENT SCROLL.
text_1488.CN: 您用黄金换取了古代卷轴。

text_1489.EN: Scroll words: The key breaks chain, heart heals hate.
text_1489.CN: 卷轴文字：钥匙断链，心治愈仇恨。

text_1490.EN: You have no gold coins to trade.

text_1491.EN: He shakes his head, unwilling to talk more.
text_1491.CN: 他摇摇头，不愿再多说什么。

text_1492.EN: You do not have gold coins.

text_1493.EN: Merchant: 'Why did the ghost avoid the cave? Too many skeletons!'
text_1493.CN: 商人：“为什么鬼魂要避开山洞？”太多骷髅了！”

text_1495.CN: 你假装死了。商人：“再来一次？”

text_1496.EN: You sing with him. Both of you sound terrible.
text_1496.CN: 你和他一起唱歌。你们俩听起来都很糟糕。

text_1497.EN: You point at distant woods. He has no interest at all.
text_1497.CN: 你指着远处的树林。他一点兴趣都没有。

text_1498.EN: You tickle the merchant. He laughs loudly.
text_1498.CN: 你惹恼了商人。他笑得很大声。

text_1499.EN: The merchant does a silly dance. You feel better.
text_1499.CN: 商人跳了一段愚蠢的舞蹈。你感觉好多了。

text_1500.EN: You float and howl. Merchant rolls eyes and keeps calm.
text_1500.CN: 你漂浮并嚎叫。商人翻白眼，保持冷静。

text_1501.EN: You ask for free gifts. Merchant shakes his head firmly.
text_1501.CN: 你要求免费礼物。商人坚定地摇头。

text_1502.EN: You lie down to sleep. Merchant quietly walks around you.
text_1502.CN: 你躺下睡觉。商人静静地在你身边走来走去。

text_1503.EN: You cheer loudly. The merchant claps weakly.
text_1503.CN: 你大声欢呼。商人有气无力地拍手。

text_1504.EN: You walk beside him. He keeps a little distance.
text_1504.CN: 你走在他身边。他保持着一点距离。

text_1507.EN: You found a HAUNTED HUT in forest.
text_1507.CN: 你在森林里发现了一个闹鬼的小屋。

text_1508.EN: You hear a woman crying: forgive me!
text_1508.CN: 你听到一个女人哭着：原谅我！

text_1509.EN: You see there still to west. Type west to go or talk ro talk.
text_1509.CN: 你看那儿还在西边。输入“west”即可前往或“talk ro talk”。

text_1511.EN: Ghost: Bring me my husband’s diary.
text_1511.CN: 鬼魂：把我丈夫的日记拿给我。

text_1512.EN: Ghost: My husband disappears with your great grand father!
text_1512.CN: 鬼：我丈夫和你曾祖父一起失踪了！

text_1514.EN: You: Who is my great grand father?

text_1516.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_1516.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_1517.EN: Ghost: I only wish to see my husband one last time.
text_1517.CN: 幽灵：我只想见我丈夫最后一面。

text_1518.EN: He stayed in the cave to watch over me, never left.
text_1518.CN: 他一直在山洞里守护着我，从未离开过。

text_1519.EN: You tell her you understand her long loneliness.
text_1519.CN: 你告诉她你理解她长久以来的孤独。

text_1520.EN: The ghost bursts into tears of relief.
text_1520.CN: 鬼魂如释重负地流下了眼泪。

text_1522.EN: The ghost just stares at you silently.
text_1522.CN: 鬼魂只是静静地看着你。

text_1523.EN: The ghost follows you to the cave entrance.
text_1523.CN: 鬼魂跟着你到洞穴入口。

text_1524.EN: Two ancient spirits meet after hundreds of years.
text_1524.CN: 两个古老的灵魂在数百年后相遇。

text_1525.EN: They wave goodbye to you, their souls rest in peace.
text_1525.CN: 他们向你挥手告别，他们的灵魂安息了。

text_1527.EN: A strange force blocks the way. Can't do this now.
text_1527.CN: 一股奇怪的力量挡住了去路。现在不能这样做。

text_1529.EN: The ghost cries and forgives everyone.

text_1530.CN: 她的灵魂终于找到了平静。

text_1531.EN: You find an ABANDONED CHURCH. There is a stone with something write on it.
text_1531.CN: 你发现一座废弃的教堂。有一块石头，上面写着什么。

text_1532.EN: You can read stone, purify or desecrate.
text_1532.CN: 你可以解读石头、净化或亵渎。

text_1536.EN: You read the stone, it says:
text_1536.CN: 你读过这块石头，上面写着：

text_1537.EN: In the past, the Evil and the wizard are the husband and wife.
text_1537.CN: 过去，邪恶与巫师是夫妻。

text_1538.EN: But, when the Evil became a succubus, the wizard must control her.
text_1538.CN: 但是，当邪恶变成魅魔时，巫师必须控制她。

text_1539.EN: Or, she will destroy the world.

text_1540.EN: The wizard love his wife very much.

text_1541.EN: So, he does not kill she, just control her to not let her harm anyone else.
text_1541.CN: 所以，他并没有杀她，只是控制她，不让她伤害别人。

text_1542.EN: Then, himself become a ghost to protect the cave and also his wife -- the Evil.
text_1542.CN: 然后，他自己变成了一个鬼魂来保护山洞和他的妻子——邪恶。

text_1543.EN: Also, all the ghosts are just the person who should protect the cave, and control the Evil.
text_1543.CN: 而且，所有的鬼魂都只是应该守护山洞、镇压邪恶的人。

text_1545.EN: So, you are the great-great grandchild of the Evil and the wizard.
text_1545.CN: 所以，你是邪恶和巫师的曾曾孙。

text_1546.EN: You have a strange feeling to the Evil in your mind.
text_1546.CN: 你心中对邪恶有一种奇怪的感觉。

text_1547.EN: The statue glows with holy light.
text_1547.CN: 雕像散发着神圣的光芒。

text_1548.EN: You wipe dust off the stone, find faded words:
text_1548.CN: 你擦掉石头上的灰尘，发现褪色的文字：

text_1549.EN: Three paths await the heir: Guard, Forgive, Depart.
text_1549.CN: 三种道路等待着继承人：守护、宽恕、离开。

text_1550.EN: Guard the cage, forgive the pain, depart the cycle.
text_1550.CN: 守卫笼子，宽恕痛苦，脱离循环。

text_1551.EN: Extra line: Only blood and key can end all sorrow.
text_1551.CN: 附言：只有鲜血和钥匙才能结束一切悲伤。

text_1556.EN: An old diary lies on the ground. Further east lies the misty swamp.
text_1556.CN: 一本旧日记躺在地上。再往东就是雾气弥漫的沼泽。

text_1558.EN: You read this old diary. It says:
text_1558.CN: 你读了这本旧日记。它说：

text_1561.EN: I do not want to kill her, but I must do something.
text_1561.CN: 我不想杀她，但我必须做点什么。

text_1562.EN: I feel that her magic energy has been more strong.
text_1562.CN: 我感觉她的魔力更加强大了。

text_1563.EN: If I do not control her, the world might be destroyed.
text_1563.CN: 如果我不控制她，世界可能会毁灭。

text_1566.EN: I control her, but I can not go out the cave again!
text_1566.CN: 我控制了她，但我不能再走出山洞了！

text_1567.EN: May be I should wait here for all my life.
text_1567.CN: 也许我应该在这里等一辈子。

text_1568.EN: So, I can not be a wizard anymore.
text_1568.CN: 所以，我不能再当巫师了。

text_1571.EN: I saw my son, and tell he when I died, he must be here for all his life too.
text_1571.CN: 我看到了我的儿子，我死后告诉他，他也一定会在这里度过一生。

text_1575.EN: You realised that this is your great-great grandfathers diary.
text_1575.CN: 你意识到这是你曾曾祖父的日记。

text_1582.EN: You have already end the misty swamp, you do not have to go in again.
text_1582.CN: 你已经结束了迷雾沼泽，不用再进去了。

text_1583.EN: You go back to the road.

text_1584.EN: You find some mosquite in the tree, Hp -1
text_1584.CN: 你在树上发现一些蚊子，Hp -1

text_1585.EN: What you are filling is as same as what I am filling!

text_1586.EN: Such a joke! Killed by a tiny mosquite.
text_1586.CN: 真是个笑话！被一只小蚊子咬死了。

text_1587.EN: Hmm... the trees are the oak tree which have grown for about fifty years.
text_1587.CN: 嗯……这些树是生长了大约五十年的橡树。

input_1588.EN: really? Cut down a tree? Y/N

text_1589.EN: You cut down a tree, you are so evil!

text_1590.EN: The tree fall on your toes.

text_1592.EN: You are killed by a tree, hahaha.

text_1593.EN: OK, so you do not cut down the tree.

text_1595.EN: The bird circles above you, chirping softly.
text_1595.CN: 鸟儿在你头顶盘旋，轻声鸣叫。

text_1597.EN: The bird flies away, leaving you confused.
text_1597.CN: 鸟儿飞走了，让你感到困惑。

text_1598.EN: The bird eats happily, then drops a small feather.
text_1598.CN: 小鸟高兴地吃着，然后掉下了一根小羽毛。

text_1599.EN: You got SPIRIT FEATHER! It glows faintly.
text_1599.CN: 你有灵魂之羽！它发出微弱的光芒。

text_1600.EN: You wave to a bird. It flies closer for a second.
text_1600.CN: 你向一只鸟挥手。它飞近了一会儿。

text_1602.EN: You find a hidden trail leading to an ABANDONED CAMP. There is a camp in the west. And also a grave in the east. And the path still leads to a hill to south.
text_1602.CN: 你发现了一条通往废弃营地的隐藏小径。西边有一个营地。东边还有一座坟墓。这条路仍然通向南边的一座小山。

text_1603.EN: You see a grave, something is written on it: game developer, killed by a lot of bug and error.
text_1603.CN: 你看到一个坟墓，上面写着一些东西：游戏开发者，被很多错误和错误杀死。

text_1604.EN: A voice booms: Dig the grave, then you will find me. Or, you can search the grave.
text_1604.CN: 一个声音响起：挖坟墓，然后你就会找到我。或者，你可以搜查坟墓。

text_1605.EN: You see a lot of camps and a cliff.
text_1605.CN: 你会看到很多营地和悬崖。

text_1606.EN: You feel someone is calling you to go to the tomb.
text_1606.CN: 你感觉有人在呼唤你去坟墓。

text_1607.EN: Type search to search, chest to open chest, back to go back.
text_1607.CN: 输入搜索进行搜索，输入宝箱打开宝箱，输入返回返回。

text_1608.EN: You see here a corpse, type corpse to search it.\n
text_1608.CN: 您在这里看到一具尸体，请输入 corpse 进行搜索。\n

text_1610.EN: You head west into the camp.

text_1611.EN: Old tents, cold firepit, and a chest.
text_1611.CN: 旧帐篷、冰冷的火坑和一个箱子。

text_1612.EN: You make a funny face. A squirrel stares at you.
text_1612.CN: 你做鬼脸。一只松鼠盯着你。

text_1613.EN: You count stars. You fall asleep after 3.
text_1613.CN: 你数星星。 3点以后你就睡着了。

text_1614.EN: You talk to the campfire. It does not answer.
text_1614.CN: 你对着篝火说话。它没有回答。

text_1615.EN: You jump up and down. You look silly.
text_1615.CN: 你上蹿下跳。你看起来很傻。

text_1616.EN: \nA corpse slumps against the dusty table. It wears your exact clothes.
text_1616.CN: \n一具尸体倒在布满灰尘的桌子上。它穿着和你一模一样的衣服。

text_1617.EN: Nothing useful left on the body.
text_1617.CN: 身上已经没有什么有用的东西了。

text_1619.EN: There is a ghost hidden in the firepit!

text_1620.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_1620.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_1621.EN: There is a ghost hidden in the firepit. It kills you!
text_1621.CN: 火坑里藏着一个鬼魂。它会杀了你！

text_1624.EN: Ghost: Wish you good luck, my god.
text_1624.CN: 幽灵：祝你好运，我的上帝。

text_1625.EN: Your amulet keeps the ghost away.
text_1625.CN: 你的护身符可以让鬼魂远离你。

text_1626.EN: You play with a small stone. So fun!
text_1626.CN: 你玩一块小石头。太有趣了！

text_1627.EN: You yell loudly in the camp.

text_1629.EN: You tell a joke to the grave.

text_1630.EN: A faint laugh echoes: 'That was terrible!'
text_1630.CN: 一阵微弱的笑声响起：“太可怕了！”

text_1632.EN: You open the chest and find a FLINT.
text_1632.CN: 你打开箱子并找到一根火石。

text_1633.EN: The stone door is sealed. Only the returning one may enter.
text_1633.CN: 石门被封住了。只有归来的人才能进入。

text_1634.EN: You walk back to the road.

text_1635.CN: 你发现一个古老的墓地。

text_1636.EN: Ghost smiles: Happy full moon! Here's a gift!
text_1636.CN: 鬼微笑：满月快乐！这是一份礼物！

text_1637.EN: Ghosts wander, but they do not attack.

text_1638.CN: 你找到了一个超级护身符。

text_1639.EN: You put it in your bag and walk back quietly.
text_1639.CN: 你把它放进包里，然后静静地走回去。

text_1640.EN: You walk back to the road.

text_1641.CN: 前方是一座陡峭的悬崖。

text_1642.EN: You use rope to climb down to cave entrance.
text_1642.CN: 你用绳子爬下来到洞穴入口。

text_1646.EN: You need a rope to climb down.
text_1646.CN: 你需要一根绳子才能爬下来。

text_1648.EN: Rune text: Three runes control the seal. And someone should cotrol it again with it.
text_1648.CN: 符文文字：三个符文控制着封印。应该有人用它再次控制它。

text_1649.EN: You find a hole for a rune, but you may have already took the rune away.
text_1649.CN: 你找到了一个符文的洞，但你可能已经把符文拿走了。

text_1650.EN: You dig the grave. There is some treasure and a diary. Take treasure or leave it? take / leave (Even you choose any choice, you will read the diary.)
text_1650.CN: 你挖坟。有一些宝藏和一本日记。带走宝藏还是留下它？走/走（即使你选择任何选择，你也会读日记。）

text_1651.EN: You take the treasure. The spirit rages.

text_1654.EN: You found the EXPLORER’S COMPLETE DIARY!
text_1654.CN: 您找到了探险家的完整日记！

text_1655.EN: It reveals some of the truth of the cave and the demon.
text_1655.CN: 它揭示了洞穴和恶魔的一些真相。

text_1656.EN: It says that a long time ago, there was a beautiful woman.
text_1656.CN: 据说很久以前，有一个美丽的女人。

text_1657.EN: Unfortunately, one day, she was killed by a man who do not like her.
text_1657.CN: 不幸的是，有一天，她被一个不喜欢她的男人杀死了。

text_1659.EN: The man found the succubus and the succubus killed him.
text_1659.CN: 男子找到了魅魔，魅魔杀了他。

text_1660.EN: Then, a wizard appears, and control her, so she became a Evil.
text_1660.CN: 然后，一个巫师出现，并控制了她，让她变成了恶魔。

text_1661.EN: She was active when the wizard died.

text_1662.EN: And then, the diarys owner go on and control the Evil.
text_1662.CN: 然后，日记的主人继续控制邪恶。

text_1663.EN: It also says, he is your great-great grandfather!
text_1663.CN: 上面还写着，他是你的曾曾祖父！

text_1664.EN: In the end of diary, you great grandfather says that he have be in the cave for 60 years.
text_1664.CN: 在日记的最后，你曾祖父说他已经在山洞里呆了60年了。

text_1665.EN: He had wanted to unleash his great grandmother for a lot of times.
text_1665.CN: 他很多次都想释放他的曾祖母。

text_1666.EN: Then he give up. And he also says that if you see this diary, you will have to choose an answer.
text_1666.CN: 然后他放弃了。他还说，如果你看到这本日记，你就必须选择一个答案。

text_1667.EN: There is still some words, but you can not read them because they are covered by a lot of blood.
text_1667.CN: 还有一些文字，但你看不清它们，因为它们被大量的血覆盖了。

text_1669.EN: You respect the deceased. The spirit approves.

text_1672.EN: You found the EXPLORER’S COMPLETE DIARY!
text_1672.CN: 您找到了探险家的完整日记！

text_1673.EN: It reveals the full truth of the cave and the demon.
text_1673.CN: 它揭示了洞穴和恶魔的全部真相。

text_1674.EN: It says that a long time ago, there was a beautiful woman.
text_1674.CN: 据说很久以前，有一个美丽的女人。

text_1675.EN: Unfortunately, one day, she was killed by a man who do not like her.
text_1675.CN: 不幸的是，有一天，她被一个不喜欢她的男人杀死了。

text_1677.EN: The man found the succubus and the succubus killed him.
text_1677.CN: 男子找到了魅魔，魅魔杀了他。

text_1678.EN: Then, a wizard appears, and control her, so she became a Evil.
text_1678.CN: 然后，一个巫师出现，并控制了她，让她变成了恶魔。

text_1679.EN: She was active when the wizard died.

text_1680.EN: And then, the diarys owner go on and control the Evil.
text_1680.CN: 然后，日记的主人继续控制邪恶。

text_1681.EN: It also says, he is your great-great grandfather!
text_1681.CN: 上面还写着，他是你的曾曾祖父！

text_1682.EN: In the end of diary, you great grandfather says that he have be in the cave for 60 years.
text_1682.CN: 在日记的最后，你曾祖父说他已经在山洞里呆了60年了。

text_1683.EN: He had wanted to unleash his great grandmother for a lot of times.
text_1683.CN: 他很多次都想释放他的曾祖母。

text_1684.EN: Then he give up. And he also says that if you see this diary, you will have to choose an answer.
text_1684.CN: 然后他放弃了。他还说，如果你看到这本日记，你就必须选择一个答案。

text_1685.EN: There is still some words, but you can not read them because they are covered by a lot of blue ink.
text_1685.CN: 还有一些文字，但是你看不清它们，因为它们被大量的蓝墨水覆盖了。

text_1687.EN: Sorry, I do not understand that word.

text_1695.EN: She bears no malice toward the world.
text_1695.CN: 她对这个世界没有恶意。

text_1696.EN: She only resents being confined by her lover for two century.
text_1696.CN: 她只怨恨自己被爱人禁锢了两个世纪。

text_1697.EN: The road ends here. Only the tunnel remains.
text_1697.CN: 路到这里就结束了。只剩下隧道了。

text_1706.EN: The walls are filled with fragments of time.
text_1706.CN: 墙壁上布满了时间的碎片。

text_1707.EN: You see her first meeting with the wizard.
text_1707.CN: 你看到她第一次与巫师见面。

text_1708.EN: Laughter echoes in the empty space.
text_1708.CN: 空旷的空间里，回荡着笑声。

text_1709.EN: You see the day she was betrayed by the world.
text_1709.CN: 你看到她被世界背叛的那一天。

text_1710.EN: You see the fear that drove him to make the seal.
text_1710.CN: 你可以看到驱使他进行封印的恐惧。

text_1711.EN: You see two hundred years of silent waiting.
text_1711.CN: 你看到了两百年的沉默等待。

text_1712.EN: The corridor reveals all her past.
text_1712.CN: 走廊揭露了她所有的过去。

text_1713.EN: Then, you finally understand that your great-great grandfather is just too afraid to losing her, not afraid she destroy the world.
text_1713.CN: 然后，你终于明白，你的曾曾祖父只是害怕失去她，而不是害怕她毁灭世界。

text_1715.EN: All the diary, may be all fake, but he can not change this corridor.
text_1715.CN: 所有的日记，也许都是假的，但他却无法改变这条走廊。

text_1718.EN: Runes glow faintly on the stone.
text_1718.CN: 石头上的符文发出微弱的光芒。

text_1719.EN: This is where she was trapped for two hundred years.
text_1719.CN: 这就是她被困了两百年的地方。

text_1720.EN: The seal was not for punishment.

text_1721.EN: It was a desperate act of love.
text_1721.CN: 这是一种绝望的爱之举。

text_1723.EN: You understand the truth of the seal.

text_1727.EN: She was a prisoner of love.

text_1728.CN: 她从来没有憎恨过这个世界。

text_1729.EN: She only grieved for the one who locked her away.
text_1729.CN: 她只是为那个将她锁起来的人感到悲伤。

text_1731.EN: She appears in front of you.

text_1732.EN: Her eyes are calm, not angry.
text_1732.CN: 她的眼神很平静，没有愤怒。

text_1740.EN: She smiles and fades into light.
text_1740.CN: 她微笑着，消失在光芒中。

text_1741.EN: No more pain. No more cage.
text_1741.CN: 不再痛苦了。不再有笼子了。

text_1745.EN: \nYou choose to stay by her side.

text_1751.CN: \n你抹去了所有的记忆和羁绊。

text_1757.EN: \nYou call forth the wizard's lingering spirit.
text_1757.CN: \n你召唤出巫师挥之不去的灵魂。

text_1758.EN: The two souls meet again after a hundred years apart.
text_1758.CN: 两个灵魂相隔一百年后再次相遇。

text_1759.EN: Hatred and pain fade away at last.
text_1759.CN: 仇恨和痛苦终于消失了。

text_1760.EN: They stay side by side, free from seal and sorrow.
text_1760.CN: 他们并肩而行，没有封印和悲伤。

text_1761.CN: 最终结局：真实的最终结局

text_1766.EN: You can type start or quit or task for tasks.
text_1766.CN: 您可以键入“开始”或“退出”或“任务”来执行任务。

text_1767.EN: You can try to type time to do a time travel and avoid the trady.
text_1767.CN: 您可以尝试输入时间来进行时间旅行并避免传统。

text_1773.CN: 输入 dev 进行作弊。

text_1775.EN: A voice booms: Mortrol, you have done well, you can go to my home -- ILLUSION TUNNEL and meet me now.
text_1775.CN: 一个声音响起：Mortrol，你做得很好，你现在可以去我的家——幻影隧道来见我了。

text_1776.EN: The voice also says: And I have tell you that I am your great-great grandfather -- the wizard.
text_1776.CN: 这个声音还说：我已经告诉你，我是你的曾曾祖父——巫师。

text_1779.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_1784.EN: You can final see what you can cheat:
text_1784.CN: 你最终可以看到你能作弊什么：

text_1789.CN: -c、-C、-cheat 启用作弊模式（所有项目）

text_1792.EN: And, do you know, when you are at the ng one, you can type Garry in the house, then you will win!
text_1792.CN: 而且，你知道吗，当你在ng的时候，你可以在房子里输入Garry，那么你就赢了！

text_1793.EN: Also, you can type colin, and woody and garry in the house, then you will pass the ng one.\n
text_1793.CN: 另外，你可以在房子里输入 colin、woody 和 garry，然后你就会通过 ng 。\n

text_1794.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_1799.EN: TRUE ENDING (ng2): find three stone runes -> go to the altar -> read diarys (You can also do not done this) -> place runes -> choose
text_1799.CN: TRUE ENDING (ng2): 找到三个石头符文 -> 前往祭坛 -> 阅读日记（你也可以不这样做） -> 放置符文 -> 选择

text_1800.EN: RICH ENDING: house -> take things -> go on the altar -> go in the cave -> west -> choose way
text_1800.CN: 丰富结局：房子 -> 拿东西 -> 走上祭坛 -> 进入山洞 -> 西边 -> 选择道路

text_1801.EN: DUNGEON: play again -> south -> go to tomb -> search by yourself
text_1801.CN: 地下城：再玩一次->南边->去古墓->自己搜索

text_1803.EN: I can not help you too.

text_1806.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_1811.EN: New cycle begins, hope fills the cave.
text_1811.CN: 新的周期开始，希望充满了洞穴。

text_1815.CN: 古老的记录焕发光芒，记忆被搅动。

text_1823.CN: 第一道光削弱了黑暗的力量。

text_1831.CN: 柔和的温暖使所有的精神平静。

text_1835.CN: 温柔的心可以治愈旧伤。

text_1843.CN: 善良可以净化黑暗的光环。

text_1851.CN: 月光揭示了被遗忘的真相。

text_1911.CN: 你会收到一颗愚蠢的糖果。

text_1927.CN: 火焰可以屏蔽一切伤害。

text_1995.CN: 洞穴里熊熊燃烧着温暖的火焰。

text_2035.CN: 平静安静的包裹着山洞。

text_2053.EN: A voice booms: Mortrol, you final break the cycle, you pass my exam, so I will let you go to the heaven and meet me.\n
text_2053.CN: 一个声音响起：Mortrol，你终于打破了循环，你通过了我的考试，所以我会让你去天堂与我见面。\n

text_2054.EN: Game developer: PLayer, you have already done the main game, you can quit now or go to the last part.
text_2054.CN: 游戏开发者：玩家，您已经完成了主游戏，您可以退出或进入最后一部分。

text_2055.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_2056.EN: Welcome to death adventure! You are a poor adventure, dream of rich and treasure. I will be your eyes and hands. You can say west or east north and south to control.
text_2056.CN: 欢迎来到死亡冒险！你是一个贫穷的冒险家，梦想着富有和宝藏。我将成为你的眼睛和双手。你可以说西或东、北、南来控制。

text_2057.EN: Your family always have somebody disappears. Your father said that he will go on a holiday, but he never came back.\n
text_2057.CN: 你的家人总是有人失踪。你父亲说他要去度假，但他再也没有回来。\n

text_2058.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===

text_2059.EN: Welcome to death adventure! You are a god who go to the mortrol world. I will be your eyes and hands. You can say west or east north and south to control.
text_2059.CN: 欢迎来到死亡冒险！你是一个来到凡人世界的神。我将成为你的眼睛和双手。你可以说西或东、北、南来控制。

text_2060.EN: You go to mortrol world beacause you see a family which have a curse. But unfortunately, you become a part of the curse too!
text_2060.CN: 你去魔界是因为你看到一个被诅咒的家庭。但不幸的是，你也成为了诅咒的一部分！

text_2061.EN: Then, you become a mortrol who has the power of a god.
text_2061.CN: 然后，你就成为了一个拥有神的力量的凡人。

text_2066.EN: Welcome back to the death adventure!

text_2070.EN: Descendent, you done a well job.

text_2071.EN: Our cuse will be broken by you.
text_2071.CN: 我们的罪孽将被你打破。

text_2072.EN: Please hurry! Before out ghosts disappears.
text_2072.CN: 请快点！在鬼魂消失之前。

text_2073.EN: Go to the campsite, then go to the tomb to find me.
text_2073.CN: 去露营地，然后去坟墓找我。

text_2075.EN: So, you will go to the menu.

text_2077.EN: Welcome to the last but not least part of death adventure.
text_2077.CN: 欢迎来到死亡冒险的最后但并非最不重要的部分。

text_2078.EN: You will never go to the cave again, instead, your great-great grandfather tell you to go somewhere.
text_2078.CN: 你再也不会去那个山洞了，相反，你的曾曾祖父告诉你去某个地方。

text_2079.EN: So, you will go to the menu.

text_2080.EN: So, you died, and you will go back to the menu to choose if you want to challenge again.
text_2080.CN: 所以，你死了，你会回到菜单选择是否要再次挑战。

text_2081.EN: And you have to come to the first turn of the cycle.
text_2081.CN: 你必须到达周期的第一个回合。

text_2083.EN: [Whisper] Maybe try the dev room next time?\n
text_2083.CN: [小声] 下次可以试试开发室吗？\n

text_2084.EN: \n[Ghost Laugh] Five death! You're our favorite visitor!\n
text_2084.CN: \n[鬼笑]五死！您是我们最喜欢的访客！\n

text_2085.EN: \n[Ghosts Sing] You are part of us now!
text_2085.CN: \n[鬼魂歌唱]你现在是我们的一部分了！

text_2086.EN: You finally become a ghost, and can not be birth forever.
text_2086.CN: 你最终变成了鬼，并且永远无法重生。

text_2089.CN: === 死亡冒险 v1.0 - 正式发布 ===
